entry.title: A-LOAM code study
entry.content:
ŪôćžĹ©Í≥ľÍłįŽĆÄ Aerial Robotics Group

LOAM žĹĒŽďúÍįÄ ŽĒįŽ°ú Í≥ĶÍįúÍįÄ ŽźėžßÄ žēäžēĄ ŽÖľŽ¨łžĚĄ ÍłįŽįė žĹĒŽďúŽ•ľ žěĎžĄĪŪēėžó¨ ŽįįŪŹ¨ŪēúÍ≤Ć A-LOAMžĚīŽĚľÍ≥† ŪēúŽč§.

EigenÍ≥ľ Ceres SolverŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī žĹĒŽďúŽ•ľ ÍįĄŽěĶŪēėÍ≤Ć ŽßĆŽď§žóąŽč§Í≥† ŪēėŽäĒŽćį, žĚīžįłžóź Ceres Solveržóź ŽĆÄŪēī Í≥ĶŽ∂ÄŽ•ľ ÍįôžĚī Ūē† žąė žěąŽäĒ žĘčžĚÄ ÍłįŪöĆÍįÄ Žź† Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

ROSŽ•ľ ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú ŪēėŽ©į launch ŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ žč§ŪĖČŪēėŽ©ī žĄłÍįÄžßÄ ŽÖłŽďúÍįÄ žč§ŪĖČŽźúŽč§:

  • Scan Registration (ascanRegistration)
  • Laser Odometry (alaserOdometry)
  • Laser Mapping (alaserMapping)

žĚīŽ•ľ rqt_graphŽ°ú Ž≥īÍ≤Ć ŽźėŽ©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

  1. Scan Registration
    • Input: /velodyne_points
    • Output:
      • /velodyne_cloud_2
      • /laser_remove_points
      • /laser_cloud_flat
      • /laser_cloud_less_flat
      • /laser_cloud_sharp
      • /laser_cloud_less_sharp
  2. Laser Odometry
    • Input:
      • /velodyne_cloud_2
      • /laser_remove_points
      • /laser_cloud_flat
      • /laser_cloud_less_flat
      • /laser_cloud_sharp
      • /laser_cloud_less_sharp
    • Output:
      • /velodyne_cloud_3
      • /laser_cloud_surf_last
      • /laser_cloud_corner_last
      • /laser_odom_to_init
      • /laser_odom_path
  3. Laser Mapping
    • Input:
      • /velodyne_cloud_3
      • /laser_cloud_surf_last
      • /laser_cloud_corner_last
      • /laser_odom_to_init
    • Output:
      • /laser_cloud_map
      • /aft_mapped_to_init
      • /aft_mapped_to_init_high_frec
      • /aft_mapped_path
      • /velodyne_cloud_registered
      • /laser_cloud_surround

žúĄžôÄ ÍįôžĚī raw lidar cloudÍįÄ Ž®ľž†Ä scan registeration ŽÖłŽďúžóź Žď§žĖīÍįÄ ÍįÄÍ≥ĶŽźú Žč§žĚĆ laser odometery ŽÖłŽďúžóź Žď§žĖīÍįÄÍ≥† laser mappingžóźžĄú mapping ŽįŹ registerationžĚī ŽźėŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

Scan Registration

LiDAR point cloud ÍįÄ ž≤ėžĚĆ Žď§žĖīžė§Ž©ī Ž®ľž†Ä ŪēėŽäĒ žĚľžĚī NaN pointžôÄ Í∑ľž≤ė point cloudŽ•ľ žā≠ž†úŪēėŽäĒ žĚľžĚīŽč§. žĚīŽäĒ removeNaNFromPointCloud Ūē®žąėžôÄ removeNaNNormalsFromPointCloud Ūē®žąėŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŽźėŽ©į, žó¨ÍłįžĄú ŪēúÍįÄžßÄ ÍįĄŽč®ŪēėžßÄŽßĆ ÍįĄÍ≥ľŪĖąŽćė ž†źžĚÄ vectoržóźžĄú resizeŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽĻ†Ž•īÍ≤Ć ž†źžĚĄ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪē† žąė žěąŽč§ŽäĒ ž†źžĚīŽč§. žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī žĖīŽĖ§ žßĎŪē©žóźžĄú ž°įÍĪīžĚĄ ŽßĆž°ĪŪēėŽäĒ elementŽßĆ ž∂ĒŽ†§ŽāīÍ≥†žěź Ūē† ŽēĆ žĚīž†ĄÍĻĆžßÄŽäĒ Í∑łŽü¨Ūēú elementŽ•ľ žÉąŽ°úžöī vectoržóź push_back Ūē®žúľŽ°úžć® ž∂ĒŽ†§ŽÉąŽäĒŽćį, žó¨ÍłįžĄúŽäĒ žÉąŽ°úžöī vectorŽ•ľ žßĎŪē©žĚė ŪĀ¨ÍłįžôÄ Íįôžóź initialization žčúŪā® ŪõĄ, forŽ¨łžĚĄ ŽŹĆŽ©į ž°įÍĪīžĚĄ ŽßĆž°ĪŪē† ŽēĆ ŪēėŽāėžĒ© žĪĄžõĆŽāėÍįĄ Ží§, redundentŪēú ŽāėŽ®łžßÄ vector elementŽ•ľ žā≠ž†úŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēī resizeŽ•ľ žĚīžö©ŪĖąŽč§ŽäĒ ž†źžĚīŽč§.

Velodyne LiDARŽ•ľ žā¨žö©Ūēúž†ĀžĚī žóÜŽäĒŽćį, velodynežóźžĄúŽäĒ ž†źžĚī Ž™áŽ≤ąžßł channelžĚłžßÄ (ring) žēĆŽ†§ž£ľžßÄ žēäŽäĒ ŽďĮ ŪēėŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú NaN pointžôÄ close pointŽ•ľ žā≠ž†úŪēú Ží§, ÍįĀ point ÍįĀŽŹĄžóź ŽĒįŽĚľ Ž™áŽ≤ąžßł ringžĚłžßÄ ÍĶ¨Ž∂ĄŪēú Ží§, ÍįĀ ringŽ≥Ą pointŽ°ú Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŪēėŽ©į, scanžĚė žčúžěĎ žčúÍįĄÍ≥ľ ŽĀĚ žčúÍįĄžĚĄ Í≥†Ž†§Ūēī ÍįĀ pointŽď§žĚī Žď§žĖīžė® žčúž†źŽŹĄ Í≥ĄžāįŪēúŽč§.

žĚīŪõĄ cornerž†źÍ≥ľ surfacež†źžĚĄ ÍĶ¨Ž∂ĄŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēī ÍįĀ ž†źŽßąŽč§ žĘĆ žöį 5ÍįúžĒ© ž†źŽď§žĚĄ Ž™®žēĄ Í≥ĄžāįžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēúŽč§. x, y, z Íįížóź ŽĒįŽĚľ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī Í≥ĄžāįŪēúŽč§.

\[\begin{align} diff_{x} = p_{i-5}^x + p_{i-4}^x + p_{i-3}^x + p_{i-2}^x + p_{i-1}^x - 10p_{i}^x + p_{i+1}^x + p_{i+2}^x + p_{i+3}^x + p_{i+4}^x + p_{i+5}^x \\ diff_{y} = p_{i-5}^y + p_{i-4}^y + p_{i-3}^y + p_{i-2}^y + p_{i-1}^y - 10p_{i}^y + p_{i+1}^y + p_{i+2}^y + p_{i+3}^y + p_{i+4}^y + p_{i+5}^y \\ diff_{z} = p_{i-5}^z + p_{i-4}^z + p_{i-3}^z + p_{i-2}^z + p_{i-1}^z - 10p_{i}^z + p_{i+1}^z + p_{i+2}^z + p_{i+3}^z + p_{i+4}^z + p_{i+5}^z \end{align}\]

Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† curvatureŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī ž†ēžĚėŪēúŽč§.

\[c = diff_{x}^2 + diff_{y}^2 + diff_{z}^2\]

žĚīŪõĄ pointžĚė žĄĪžßąžĚĄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī ŽĄ§ÍįÄžßÄŽ°ú Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŪēúŽč§.

  • cornerPointsSharp
  • cornerPointsLessSharp
  • surfPointsFlat
  • surfPointsLessFlat

žúĄžĚė Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŽ•ľ ŪēėÍłį ž†Ą scanStartIndžôÄ scanEndIndŽ°ú ÍįĀ ringžĚė žčúžěĎž†źÍ≥ľ ŽĀĚž†źžĚĄ ŪĎúŪėĄŪēėŽäĒŽćį, žúĄžĚė žąėžčĚž≤ėŽüľ ž≤ėžĚĆ 5ÍįúžôÄ ŽĀĚžĚė 5Íįúžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ curvatureŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨Ūē† žąė žóÜžúľŽčą žĚīŽď§žĚĄ ŽĻľÍ≥† žěĎžĄĪŪēúŽč§.

ÍįĀ ŽßĀžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄú

for (int i = 0; i < N_SCANS; i++)
{
    if( scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i] < 6)
        continue;
    pcl::PointCloud<PointType>::Ptr surfPointsLessFlatScan(new pcl::PointCloud<PointType>);
    for (int j = 0; j < 6; j++)
    {
        int sp = scanStartInd[i] + (scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i]) * j / 6; 
        int ep = scanStartInd[i] + (scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i]) * (j + 1) / 6 - 1;

        TicToc t_tmp;
        std::sort (cloudSortInd + sp, cloudSortInd + ep + 1, comp);
        t_q_sort += t_tmp.toc();

        int largestPickedNum = 0;
        for (int k = ep; k >= sp; k--)
        {
            int ind = cloudSortInd[k]; 

            if (cloudNeighborPicked[ind] == 0 &&
                cloudCurvature[ind] > 0.1)
            {

                largestPickedNum++;
                if (largestPickedNum <= 2)
                {                        
                    cloudLabel[ind] = 2;
                    cornerPointsSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
                    cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
                }
                else if (largestPickedNum <= 20)
                {                        
                    cloudLabel[ind] = 1; 
                    cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
                }
                else
                {
                    break;
                }

                cloudNeighborPicked[ind] = 1; 

                for (int l = 1; l <= 5; l++)
                {
                    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].x;
                    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].y;
                    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].z;
                    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
                }
                for (int l = -1; l >= -5; l--)
                {
                    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].x;
                    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].y;
                    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].z;
                    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
                }
            }
        }

        int smallestPickedNum = 0;
        for (int k = sp; k <= ep; k++)
        {
            int ind = cloudSortInd[k];

            if (cloudNeighborPicked[ind] == 0 &&
                cloudCurvature[ind] < 0.1)
            {

                cloudLabel[ind] = -1; 
                surfPointsFlat.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);

                smallestPickedNum++;
                if (smallestPickedNum >= 4)
                { 
                    break;
                }

                cloudNeighborPicked[ind] = 1;
                for (int l = 1; l <= 5; l++)
                { 
                    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].x;
                    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].y;
                    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].z;
                    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
                }
                for (int l = -1; l >= -5; l--)
                {
                    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].x;
                    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].y;
                    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].z;
                    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
                }
            }
        }

        for (int k = sp; k <= ep; k++)
        {
            if (cloudLabel[k] <= 0)
            {
                surfPointsLessFlatScan->push_back(laserCloud->points[k]);
            }
        }
    }

    pcl::PointCloud<PointType> surfPointsLessFlatScanDS;
    pcl::VoxelGrid<PointType> downSizeFilter;
    downSizeFilter.setInputCloud(surfPointsLessFlatScan);
    downSizeFilter.setLeafSize(0.2, 0.2, 0.2);
    downSizeFilter.filter(surfPointsLessFlatScanDS);

    surfPointsLessFlat += surfPointsLessFlatScanDS;
}

žõĆžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ žĹĒŽďúŽ°ú žěĎžĄĪžĚī ŽźėŽäĒŽćį ŪēėŽāė ŪēėŽāėžĒ© Žď§žó¨Žč§Ž≥īžěź.

if( scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i] < 6)
    continue;

Ž®ľž†Ä ŪēúÍįúžĚė ringžēąžóź ž†źžĚī 6Íįú žĚīŪēėžĚł Í≤Ĺžöį continue.

for (int j = 0; j < 6; j++)
{
    int sp = scanStartInd[i] + (scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i]) * j / 6; 
    int ep = scanStartInd[i] + (scanEndInd[i] - scanStartInd[i]) * (j + 1) / 6 - 1;

    ...

}

ŪēúÍįúžĚė ring point cloudŽď§žóź ŽĆÄŪēī 6Ž∂ĄŪē†žĚĄ ŪēėŽ©į, spžôÄ epŽäĒ ÍįĀ Ž∂ĄŪē†žĚė žčúžěĎ indexžôÄ ŽĀĚ indexžĚīŽč§.

std::sort (cloudSortInd + sp, cloudSortInd + ep + 1, comp);

compŪē®žąėŽäĒ i, j point indexžóź ŽĆÄŪēī curvature(i) < curvature(j) Ž•ľ returnŪēėŽäĒ Ūē®žąėŽ°úžĄú, žúĄžĚė Ūē®žąėŽäĒ cloudSortIndžĚė spŽ≤ąžßłŽ∂ÄŪĄį epŽ≤ąžßłÍĻĆžßÄŽ•ľ curvature žė§Ž¶Ąžį®žąúžúľŽ°ú ž†ēŽ†¨ŪēúŽč§.

žĚīŪõĄ int largestPickedNum = 0; žúľŽ°ú ŽÜďÍ≥† curvatureÍįÄ ÍįÄžě• ŪĀį žąúŽ≤ąŽ∂ÄŪĄį žěĎžēĄžßÄŽäĒ žąúŽ≤ąžúľŽ°ú forŽ¨łžĚĄ ŽŹĆŽ¶įŽč§.

ž≤ęŽ≤ąžßł forŽ¨ł: Cornerž†ź ŽĹĎÍłį

for (int k = ep; k >= sp; k--)
{
    int ind = cloudSortInd[k]; 

    if (cloudNeighborPicked[ind] == 0 &&
        cloudCurvature[ind] > 0.1)
    {

        largestPickedNum++;
        if (largestPickedNum <= 2)
        {                        
            cloudLabel[ind] = 2;
            cornerPointsSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
            cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
        }
        else if (largestPickedNum <= 20)
        {                        
            cloudLabel[ind] = 1; 
            cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
        }
        else
        {
            break;
        }

        cloudNeighborPicked[ind] = 1; 

        for (int l = 1; l <= 5; l++)
        {
            float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].x;
            float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].y;
            float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].z;
            if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
            {
                break;
            }

            cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
        }
        for (int l = -1; l >= -5; l--)
        {
            float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].x;
            float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].y;
            float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].z;
            if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
            {
                break;
            }

            cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
        }
    }
}

žó¨ÍłįžĄú, Ž™áÍįÄžßÄŽßĆ Ž≥īžěź:

  • cloudNeighborPickedŽäĒ ŽįĒŽ°ú žĚīžõÉ ž†źžĚī 4ÍįÄžßÄ ž†źž§Ď ŪēėŽāėŽ°ú ŽĹĎŪėĒžĚĄ Í≤Ĺžöį 1, žēĄŽčĆ Í≤Ĺžöį 0žĚīŽ©į
  • cloudLabelžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį
    • -1: Flat
    • 0: Less Flat
    • 1: Less Sharp
    • 2: Sharp žĚīŽč§.
if (cloudNeighborPicked[ind] == 0 &&
    cloudCurvature[ind] > 0.1)

ž£ľŽ≥ÄžĚė pointÍįÄ NeighborÍįÄ žēĄŽčĆ Í≤ĹžöįžôÄ curvatureÍįÄ 0.1 žĚīžÉĀžĚł Í≤Ĺžöį žąėŪĖČ:

if (largestPickedNum <= 2)
{                        
    cloudLabel[ind] = 2;
    cornerPointsSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
    cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
}

ÍįÄžě• curvatureÍįÄ ŪĀį 2Íįúžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄú sharp corner, less sharp corneržóź ž∂ĒÍįÄ

else if (largestPickedNum <= 20)
{                        
    cloudLabel[ind] = 1; 
    cornerPointsLessSharp.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);
}
else
{
    break;
}

ŽāėŽ®łžßÄ 18Íįúžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ less sharp corneržóź ž∂ĒÍįÄŪēėÍ≥† (žīĚ 20Íįú, 2Íįú ž§ĎŽ≥Ķ), ŽāėŽ®łžßÄžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ break. žě¨ŽįĆŽäĒÍĪī, Žāú curvaturežóź ŽĒįŽĚľ Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŪē† ž§Ą žēĆžēėŽäĒŽćį, žÉĀŽĆÄž†ĀžĚł curvaturežóź ŽĆÄŪēī Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŽ•ľ žßĄŪĖČŪēúŽč§ŽäĒ ž†źžĚīŽč§.

cloudNeighborPicked[ind] = 1;

ŪėĄžě¨ žĄ†ŪÉĚŽźú ž†źžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ NeighborPickedÍįÄ 1Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ē: Žāėž§Ďžóź flat pointŽēĆ žĄ†ŪÉĚŪēėžßÄ žēäÍłį žúĄŪēīžĄú ŽÜďžĚÄ žě•žĻėžĚł ŽďĮ ŪēėŽč§.

for (int l = 1; l <= 5; l++)
{
    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].x;
    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].y;
    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].z;
    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
    {
        break;
    }

    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
}
for (int l = -1; l >= -5; l--)
{
    float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].x;
    float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].y;
    float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].z;
    if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
    {
        break;
    }

    cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
}

žĘĆ žöį 5Íįú ž†źŽď§žóź ŽĆÄŪēī ŪĆźŽč®ŪēėŽäĒŽćį, ž†źÍįĄ ÍĪįŽ¶¨žĚė ž†úÍ≥ĪžĚī 0.05m žĚīžÉĀžĚł Í≤Ĺžöį ŽÖľŽ¨łžóźžĄú ŽßźŪēėŽäĒ redundent pointžĚľ žąė žěąžúľŽčą, žĚīŽď§žóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ ŪĆźŽč®žĚĄ Ž≥īŽ•ėŪēėŽäĒ ŽďĮ

ŽĎźŽ≤ąžßł forŽ¨ł: Flatž†ź ŽĹĎÍłį

int smallestPickedNum = 0;
for (int k = sp; k <= ep; k++)
{
    int ind = cloudSortInd[k];

    if (cloudNeighborPicked[ind] == 0 &&
        cloudCurvature[ind] < 0.1)
    {

        cloudLabel[ind] = -1; 
        surfPointsFlat.push_back(laserCloud->points[ind]);

        smallestPickedNum++;
        if (smallestPickedNum >= 4)
        { 
            break;
        }

        cloudNeighborPicked[ind] = 1;
        for (int l = 1; l <= 5; l++)
        { 
            float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].x;
            float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].y;
            float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l - 1].z;
            if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
            {
                break;
            }

            cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
        }
        for (int l = -1; l >= -5; l--)
        {
            float diffX = laserCloud->points[ind + l].x - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].x;
            float diffY = laserCloud->points[ind + l].y - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].y;
            float diffZ = laserCloud->points[ind + l].z - laserCloud->points[ind + l + 1].z;
            if (diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY + diffZ * diffZ > 0.05)
            {
                break;
            }

            cloudNeighborPicked[ind + l] = 1;
        }
    }
}

žĚī žēąžóźžĄú KDtree search ŽŹĄ ŪēėŽäĒŽćį, IterationžĚī ŽĄąŽ¨ī ŽŹĆžēĄÍįÄžßÄ žēäÍ≤Ć ŽĎźŽ≤ąžóź ŽĀĚŽāīŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

žĚī for loop žēąžóźžĄú ceres solveržóź ŽĆÄŪēú Žāīžö©žĚī ŽďĪžě•ŪēúŽč§‚Ä¶ (ŽĎźŽĎ•)

ceres::LossFunction *loss_function = new ceres::HuberLoss(0.1);
ceres::LocalParameterization *q_parameterization =
    new ceres::EigenQuaternionParameterization();
ceres::Problem::Options problem_options;

ceres::Problem problem(problem_options);
problem.AddParameterBlock(para_q, 4, q_parameterization);
problem.AddParameterBlock(para_t, 3);

Loss functionžĚÄ Huber lossŽ°ú ž†ēžĚėŪēėÍ≥†, žēĄŽßą rotationžóź ŽĆÄŪēú parameterizationžúľŽ°ú EigenQuaternionParameterizationžĚĄ žĄ§ž†ēŪēīž§Ä Í≤ÉžĚīŽĚľ ž∂Ēžł°ŽźúŽč§. problem_optionžĚÄ ŽĒįŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėžßÄ žēäÍ≥† ŽĄ£Í≥† (žēĄŽßą optimizationžčú printŪēīž£ľŽäĒ žĄ§ž†ē ÍįôžĚÄ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŽĄ£žĚĄ žąė žěąŽäĒ optionžĚī žēĄŽčźÍĻĆ?), problemžĚĄ ŽßĆŽď†Žč§.

Problemžóź AddParameterBlockžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī Rotationžóź ŽĆÄŪēú parameterŽ•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēīž£ľÍ≥†, quaternionžĚīÍłįžóź žēěžĄú ž†ēžĚėŪēú q_parameterization žĄ§ž†ēžĚĄ ŽĄ£ŽäĒŽč§. ŽĎźŽ≤ąžßł AddParameterBlockžóźŽäĒ žúĄžĻėŽ•ľ ŽĄ£Í≥† žúĄžĻėžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį žĄł coordinateÍįĄ ž†úžēĹžĚī žóÜÍłįžóź Í∑łŽÉ• ŽĄ£žĚÄ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§. ÍįĀ AddParameterBlockžĚė žąęžěź (4, 3)žĚÄ parameteržĚė ŪĀ¨ÍłįŽ•ľ ŽúĽŪēėŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú para_qŽäĒ double[4] ŽįįžóīŽ°ú, {1, 0, 0, 0}žĚīŽ©į, quaternion identityŽ•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīÍ≥†, para_tŽäĒ double[3] ŽįįžóīŽ°ú {0, 0, 0}žúľŽ°ú translationžĚė identityŽ•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāłŽč§.

ŽÖľŽ¨łžóźžĄú ŽāėžôÄžěąŽďĮžĚī corner pointžôÄ flat point correspondencežóź ŽĆÄŪēī cost functionžĚī Žč§Ž•īÍłįžóź, ÍįĀÍįĀ forŽ¨łžĚĄ ŽŹĆŽ¶¨Ž©į correspondenceŽ•ľ žįĺžēĄ ceres_solverŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨ž∂ēŪēúŽč§.

ž≤ęŽ≤ąžßł forŽ¨ł: Cornerž†źžóź ŽĆÄŪēú correspondence ž≤ėŽ¶¨

for (int i = 0; i < cornerPointsSharpNum; ++i)
{
    TransformToStart(&(cornerPointsSharp->points[i]), &pointSel);
    kdtreeCornerLast->nearestKSearch(pointSel, 1, pointSearchInd, pointSearchSqDis);

    int closestPointInd = -1, minPointInd2 = -1;
    if (pointSearchSqDis[0] < DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD)
    {
        closestPointInd = pointSearchInd[0];
        int closestPointScanID = int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[closestPointInd].intensity);

        double minPointSqDis2 = DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD;
        // search in the direction of increasing scan line
        for (int j = closestPointInd + 1; j < (int)laserCloudCornerLast->points.size(); ++j)
        {
            // if in the same scan line, continue
            if (int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].intensity) <= closestPointScanID)
                continue;

            // if not in nearby scans, end the loop
            if (int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].intensity) > (closestPointScanID + NEARBY_SCAN))
                break;

            double pointSqDis = (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) +
                                (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) +
                                (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z);

            if (pointSqDis < minPointSqDis2)
            {
                // find nearer point
                minPointSqDis2 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd2 = j;
            }
        }

        // search in the direction of decreasing scan line
        for (int j = closestPointInd - 1; j >= 0; --j)
        {
            // if in the same scan line, continue
            if (int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].intensity) >= closestPointScanID)
                continue;

            // if not in nearby scans, end the loop
            if (int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].intensity) < (closestPointScanID - NEARBY_SCAN))
                break;

            double pointSqDis = (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) +
                                (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) +
                                (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z) *
                                    (laserCloudCornerLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z);

            if (pointSqDis < minPointSqDis2)
            {
                // find nearer point
                minPointSqDis2 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd2 = j;
            }
        }
    }
    if (minPointInd2 >= 0) // both closestPointInd and minPointInd2 is valid
    {
        Eigen::Vector3d curr_point(cornerPointsSharp->points[i].x,
                                    cornerPointsSharp->points[i].y,
                                    cornerPointsSharp->points[i].z);
        Eigen::Vector3d last_point_a(laserCloudCornerLast->points[closestPointInd].x,
                                        laserCloudCornerLast->points[closestPointInd].y,
                                        laserCloudCornerLast->points[closestPointInd].z);
        Eigen::Vector3d last_point_b(laserCloudCornerLast->points[minPointInd2].x,
                                        laserCloudCornerLast->points[minPointInd2].y,
                                        laserCloudCornerLast->points[minPointInd2].z);

        double s;
        if (DISTORTION)
            s = (cornerPointsSharp->points[i].intensity - int(cornerPointsSharp->points[i].intensity)) / SCAN_PERIOD;
        else
            s = 1.0;
        ceres::CostFunction *cost_function = LidarEdgeFactor::Create(curr_point, last_point_a, last_point_b, s);
        problem.AddResidualBlock(cost_function, loss_function, para_q, para_t);
        corner_correspondence++;
    }
}

indexingžĚĄ iŽ°ú ŽÜďÍ≥† Ž™®Žď† cornerPointžóź ŽĆÄŪēī žßĄŪĖČžĚĄ ŪēúŽč§.

žĚīž†Ą žĹĒŽĄąž†źžĚė žĘĆŪĎúÍ≥Ą Íłįž§ÄžúľŽ°ú undistortion ŽįŹ transformationžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČ, pointSel Ž≥Äžąėžóź ŽĄ£ŽäĒŽč§.

TransformToStart(&(cornerPointsSharp->points[i]), &pointSel);

žó¨ÍłįžĄú TransfromToStartÍįÄ žěąŽäĒŽćį žĹĒŽďúŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

void TransformToStart(PointType const *const pi, PointType *const po)
{
    //interpolation ratio
    double s;
    if (DISTORTION)
        s = (pi->intensity - int(pi->intensity)) / SCAN_PERIOD;
    else
        s = 1.0;
    //s = 1;
    Eigen::Quaterniond q_point_last = Eigen::Quaterniond::Identity().slerp(s, q_last_curr);
    Eigen::Vector3d t_point_last = s * t_last_curr;
    Eigen::Vector3d point(pi->x, pi->y, pi->z);
    Eigen::Vector3d un_point = q_point_last * point + t_point_last;

    po->x = un_point.x();
    po->y = un_point.y();
    po->z = un_point.z();
    po->intensity = pi->intensity;
}

DISTORTION žėĶžÖėžĚī žěąžĚĄ ŽēĆ s = (pi->intensity - int(pi->intensity)) / SCAN_PERIOD Ž°ú Í≥ĄžāįŪēúŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú intensityŽäĒ, žēěžĄú žĖłÍłąŪēėžßĄ žēäžēėžßÄŽßĆ. intensity = point.intensity = scanID + scanPeriod * relTime Ž°ú scanRegistration nodežóźžĄú Í≥ĄžāįŽźúŽč§. žĚīŽäĒ ž¶Č, žĪĄŽĄźŽ≤ąŪėł(scanID) + scanPeriod (0.1s) *relTime (ŪėĄžě¨/ž†Ąž≤ī) Ž°ú ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīžßÄŽ©į, ž†ēžąė Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚÄ scanIDÍįÄ Žāėžė§Í≥† žÜĆžąęž†źžĚÄ scan žčúžěĎ ŪõĄ žßÄŽāú žčúÍįĄžĚĄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāłŽč§.

Í≤įÍĶ≠ sŽäĒ (ŪėĄžě¨/ž†Ąž≤ī)ÍįÄ ŽźúŽč§. (ŪėĄžě¨/ž†Ąž≤ī)žóź ŽĆÄŪēú ž†ēŪôēŪēú ž†ēžĚėŽäĒ Ūēú žä§žļĒžĚĄ ŽŹĄŽäĒ žčúÍįĄ(ž†Ąž≤ī) Ž∂ĄžĚė ŪėĄžě¨ ž†źžĚī žįćŪěĆ žčúÍįĄ žĚīŽč§.

žó¨Ūäľ, slerpžĚÄ sperical linear interpolationžĚĄ ŽúĽŪēėŽ©į, ŪöĆž†Ą Ž≥ÄŪôėžóźžĄúžĚė smoothŪēú interpolationžĚĄ žúĄŪēī ŽßĆŽď§žĖīžßĄÍĪį ÍįôŽč§. QuaternionžĚīÍłįžóź, QuationionžĚė identity {1, 0, 0, 0}Í≥ľ q_last_curržĚė sŽßĆŪĀľžĚė interpolationžĚĄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

žó¨Ūäľ, undistortionžĚė Žį©žčĚžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄú žÉĚÍįĀžĚĄ ŪēīŽ≥īŽ©ī, žó¨ÍłįžĄú Žāėžė® q_point_lastžôÄ t_point_lastŽäĒ žĚīž†Ą stepžóźžĄú ÍĶ¨Ūēú relative poseŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī constant velocity, constant angular rateŽ•ľ ÍįÄž†ēŪēėÍ≥† žĚīž†Ą Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßÄÍ≥† undistortionžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēú Í≤ÉžúľŽ°ú Ž≥īžĚłŽč§.

žĚīŪõĄ žĚīž†Ą žĘĆŪĎúÍ≥ĄŽ•ľ Íłįž§ÄžúľŽ°ú Ūēėžó¨ ŪėĄžě¨ ž†źŽď§žĚĄ undistortion ŽįŹ translationŪēúŽč§. (Í∑łŽěėžĄú DISTORTIONžĚī žēĄŽčź ŽēĆ s = 1žĚīžėÄÍĶ¨Žāė „Öé), Í∑ľŽćį Í∑łŽüįžčĚžúľŽ°ú žÉĚÍįĀŪēėŽ©ī sÍįÄ 1Ž≥īŽč§ žĽ§žēľŽźėŽäĒŽćį, Í∑łŽüľ (ŪėĄžě¨/ž†Ąž≤ī)+1žĚī ŽźėŽäĒÍĪłÍĻĆ? žēĄŽčąŽ©ī žĹĒŽďúÍįÄ žěėŽ™ĽŽźúÍĪłÍĻĆ „Öú žó¨Ūäľ žßĄŪĖČ

žßÄŽāú ŪĒĄŽ†ąžěĄžĚė ŽßąžßÄŽßČ corneržĚė kdTree ÍĶ¨ž°įŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī undistortionžĚī Žźú ŪėĄžě¨ ž†źŽď§ÍįĄžĚė correspondenceŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨ŪēúŽč§.

kdtreeCornerLast->nearestKSearch(pointSel, 1, pointSearchInd, pointSearchSqDis);

ÍįÄžě• ÍįÄÍĻĆžöī žąúžúľŽ°ú pointSearchIndžóź žĆďžĚīŽ©į, distance ÍįíŽď§ŽŹĄ pointSearchSqDisžóź žĆďžĚłŽč§. žó¨ÍłįžĄú 1žĚÄ ÍįÄžě• ÍįÄÍĻĆžöīÍ≤ÉŽßĆ žįĺŽäĒŽč§ŽäĒ ŽúĽ.

if (pointSearchSqDis[0] < DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD)

žó¨ÍłįžĄúŽ∂ÄŪĄįÍįÄ ž°įÍłą žĚīŪēīÍįÄ žēąÍįÄÍłī ŪēúŽč§. ÍįÄžě• ÍįÄÍĻĆžöī distanceÍįÄ ŽĮłŽ¶¨ ž†ēŪēīžßĄ DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLDŽ≥īŽč§ žěĎžúľŽ©ī,

Ž®ľž†Ä ÍįÄžě• ÍįÄÍĻĆžöī point indexžóź ŽĆÄŪēú ž†ēŽ≥īŽ•ľ closestPointIndžóź ŽĄ£Í≥†

closestPointInd = pointSearchInd[0];

closestPointScanID (scan no)Ž•ľ closestPointScanID žóź ŽĄ£žĖīž§ÄŽč§. žó¨ÍłįžĄú IDŽäĒ žĚīž†Ą cornerž†źŽď§žĚĄ Íłįž§ÄžúľŽ°ú idžĚłŽďĮ

int closestPointScanID = int(laserCloudCornerLast->points[closestPointInd].intensity);

Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† žĚľŽč® minPointSqDis2Ž•ľ DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLDŽ°ú žßÄž†ēŪēīŽÜďÍ≥†

double minPointSqDis2 = DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD;

closestPointScanID Ž∂ÄŪĄį ž¶ĚÍįÄŪēėŽäĒ Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°ú žčúžěĎŪēúŽč§. ž£ľžĄĚžúľŽ°ú ‚Äúsearch in the direction of increasing scan line‚ÄĚŽ°ú ž†ĀŪėÄžěąŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ Ž≥īŽ©ī, žĚīž†Ą sacnRegistrationžóźžĄú žä§žļĒŽĚľžĚł žąúžúľŽ°ú publishŪēúŽďĮ (žēĄŽčąŽ©ī žĚī ŽÖłŽďúžóźžĄú ž†Äžě•žĚĄ Í∑łŽ†áÍ≤Ć ŪĖąŽćėÍįÄ)

problem.AddResidualBlock(cost_function, loss_function, para_q, para_t);

LidarEdgeFactorŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

struct LidarEdgeFactor
{
	LidarEdgeFactor(Eigen::Vector3d curr_point_, Eigen::Vector3d last_point_a_,
					Eigen::Vector3d last_point_b_, double s_)
		: curr_point(curr_point_), last_point_a(last_point_a_), last_point_b(last_point_b_), s(s_) {}

	template <typename T>
	bool operator()(const T *q, const T *t, T *residual) const
	{

		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> cp{T(curr_point.x()), T(curr_point.y()), T(curr_point.z())};
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lpa{T(last_point_a.x()), T(last_point_a.y()), T(last_point_a.z())};
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lpb{T(last_point_b.x()), T(last_point_b.y()), T(last_point_b.z())};

		//Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_last_curr{q[3], T(s) * q[0], T(s) * q[1], T(s) * q[2]};
		Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_last_curr{q[3], q[0], q[1], q[2]};
		Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_identity{T(1), T(0), T(0), T(0)};
		q_last_curr = q_identity.slerp(T(s), q_last_curr);
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> t_last_curr{T(s) * t[0], T(s) * t[1], T(s) * t[2]};

		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lp;
		lp = q_last_curr * cp + t_last_curr;

		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> nu = (lp - lpa).cross(lp - lpb);
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> de = lpa - lpb;

		residual[0] = nu.x() / de.norm();
		residual[1] = nu.y() / de.norm();
		residual[2] = nu.z() / de.norm();

		return true;
	}

	static ceres::CostFunction *Create(const Eigen::Vector3d curr_point_, const Eigen::Vector3d last_point_a_,
									   const Eigen::Vector3d last_point_b_, const double s_)
	{
		return (new ceres::AutoDiffCostFunction<
				LidarEdgeFactor, 3, 4, 3>(
			new LidarEdgeFactor(curr_point_, last_point_a_, last_point_b_, s_)));
	}

	Eigen::Vector3d curr_point, last_point_a, last_point_b;
	double s;
};

Edge point 3Íįú (curr_point_, last_point_a_, last_point_b_)žôÄ žčúÍįĄ percent(? žĚīÍĪł Ž≠źŽĚľ ŪĎúŪėĄŪēīžēľŽźėŽāė žßĄžßú.. žó¨Ūäľ ŪėĄžě¨/ž†Ąž≤ī) sŽ•ľ ŽĄ£žĖīž£ľÍ≤Ć ŽźėŽ©į OperatoržóźžĄú quaternion q, translation t, Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† residualžĚĄ ž£ľžÜĆÍįížúľŽ°ú ŽįõŽäĒŽč§.

3 by 1 vector:

  • nu = (lp - lpa).cross(lp - lpb), Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥†
  • de = lpa - lpb;

Ž°ú ž†ēžĚėŪēėŽ©į residualžĚÄ nužĚė ÍįĀ elementŽ•ľ dežĚė normžĚė ÍįĀ elementŽ°ú ÍįĀÍįĀ ŽāėŽą†ž§ÄÍ≤ÉÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§. Point to line distance

CreatežóźžĄúŽäĒ jacobianžĚĄ ž†ēžĚėŪēīž£ľŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôžĚÄŽćį, ceresžóźžĄú ž†úÍ≥ĶŪēėŽäĒ AutoDiffCostFunctionžĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪēúŽďĮ, gtsamžĚīŽěĎ ŽĻĄžä∑ŪēėŽ©īžĄúŽŹĄ ž°įÍłą Žč§Ž•ł ÍĶ¨žĄĚžĚī žěąÍłī ŪēėŽč§. UncertaintyŽ•ľ ŽĒįŽ°ú Í≥†Ž†§ŪēėžßÄŽäĒ žēäŽäĒŽďĮ.

ŽĎźŽ≤ąžßł forŽ¨ł: Surfacež†źžóź ŽĆÄŪēú correspondence ž≤ėŽ¶¨

for (int i = 0; i < surfPointsFlatNum; ++i)
{
    TransformToStart(&(surfPointsFlat->points[i]), &pointSel);
    kdtreeSurfLast->nearestKSearch(pointSel, 1, pointSearchInd, pointSearchSqDis);

    int closestPointInd = -1, minPointInd2 = -1, minPointInd3 = -1;
    if (pointSearchSqDis[0] < DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD)
    {
        closestPointInd = pointSearchInd[0];

        // get closest point's scan ID
        int closestPointScanID = int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[closestPointInd].intensity);
        double minPointSqDis2 = DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD, minPointSqDis3 = DISTANCE_SQ_THRESHOLD;

        // search in the direction of increasing scan line
        for (int j = closestPointInd + 1; j < (int)laserCloudSurfLast->points.size(); ++j)
        {
            // if not in nearby scans, end the loop
            if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) > (closestPointScanID + NEARBY_SCAN))
                break;

            double pointSqDis = (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) +
                                (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) +
                                (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z);

            // if in the same or lower scan line
            if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) <= closestPointScanID && pointSqDis < minPointSqDis2)
            {
                minPointSqDis2 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd2 = j;
            }
            // if in the higher scan line
            else if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) > closestPointScanID && pointSqDis < minPointSqDis3)
            {
                minPointSqDis3 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd3 = j;
            }
        }

        // search in the direction of decreasing scan line
        for (int j = closestPointInd - 1; j >= 0; --j)
        {
            // if not in nearby scans, end the loop
            if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) < (closestPointScanID - NEARBY_SCAN))
                break;

            double pointSqDis = (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].x - pointSel.x) +
                                (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].y - pointSel.y) +
                                (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z) *
                                    (laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].z - pointSel.z);

            // if in the same or higher scan line
            if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) >= closestPointScanID && pointSqDis < minPointSqDis2)
            {
                minPointSqDis2 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd2 = j;
            }
            else if (int(laserCloudSurfLast->points[j].intensity) < closestPointScanID && pointSqDis < minPointSqDis3)
            {
                // find nearer point
                minPointSqDis3 = pointSqDis;
                minPointInd3 = j;
            }
        }

        if (minPointInd2 >= 0 && minPointInd3 >= 0)
        {

            Eigen::Vector3d curr_point(surfPointsFlat->points[i].x,
                                        surfPointsFlat->points[i].y,
                                        surfPointsFlat->points[i].z);
            Eigen::Vector3d last_point_a(laserCloudSurfLast->points[closestPointInd].x,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[closestPointInd].y,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[closestPointInd].z);
            Eigen::Vector3d last_point_b(laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd2].x,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd2].y,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd2].z);
            Eigen::Vector3d last_point_c(laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd3].x,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd3].y,
                                            laserCloudSurfLast->points[minPointInd3].z);

            double s;
            if (DISTORTION)
                s = (surfPointsFlat->points[i].intensity - int(surfPointsFlat->points[i].intensity)) / SCAN_PERIOD;
            else
                s = 1.0;
            ceres::CostFunction *cost_function = LidarPlaneFactor::Create(curr_point, last_point_a, last_point_b, last_point_c, s);
            problem.AddResidualBlock(cost_function, loss_function, para_q, para_t);
            plane_correspondence++;
        }
    }
}

Surface correspondenceŽ•ľ žįĺŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚÄ corner correspondenceŽ•ľ žįĺŽäĒ Í≤ÉÍ≥ľ ŪĀ¨Í≤Ć Žč§Ž•łž†źžĚÄ žóÜÍ≥†, 3ž†źžĚĄ ŽĹĎŽäĒŽćį žį®žĚīÍįÄ žĘÄ žěąŽč§. ž≤ęŽ≤ąžßł žį®žĚīž†źžĚÄ ÍįôÍĪįŽāė žěĎžĚÄ, ŽėźŽäĒ ÍįôÍĪįŽāė ŪĀį scanIDŽ•ľ Žįįž†úŪēėžßÄŽäĒ žēäžēĄ žēĄŽěė žĹĒŽďúÍįÄ surface correspondencežóźŽäĒ žóÜŽč§.

    continue;

Point to plane distanceŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨ŪēėŽäĒŽćį žěąžĖī plane modelžĚī žěėŽ™ĽŽź† žąė žěąÍłįžóź Ž≠ĒÍįÄ žĄłž†źžĚī žĖīŽĖ§ ŪėēŪÉúŽ°ú ŽÜďžó¨ž†łžěąžĚĄžßÄŽ•ľ Í≥†Ž†§Ūē† Í≤É ÍįôžēėŽäĒŽćį, ŽĒĪŪěą Í∑łŽüį Žāīžö©žĚÄ žóÜÍ≥†, žĄłž†źžĚĄ ŽĹĎžĚÄ ŪõĄ ŽįĒŽ°ú LidarPlaneFactorŽ°ú ŽĄ£ŽäĒŽč§.

ceres::CostFunction *cost_function = LidarPlaneFactor::Create(curr_point, last_point_a, last_point_b, last_point_c, s);
problem.AddResidualBlock(cost_function, loss_function, para_q, para_t);

LidarPlaneFactorŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.


struct LidarPlaneFactor
{
	LidarPlaneFactor(Eigen::Vector3d curr_point_, Eigen::Vector3d last_point_j_,
					 Eigen::Vector3d last_point_l_, Eigen::Vector3d last_point_m_, double s_)
		: curr_point(curr_point_), last_point_j(last_point_j_), last_point_l(last_point_l_),
		  last_point_m(last_point_m_), s(s_)
	{
		ljm_norm = (last_point_j - last_point_l).cross(last_point_j - last_point_m);
		ljm_norm.normalize();
	}

	template <typename T>
	bool operator()(const T *q, const T *t, T *residual) const
	{

		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> cp{T(curr_point.x()), T(curr_point.y()), T(curr_point.z())};
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lpj{T(last_point_j.x()), T(last_point_j.y()), T(last_point_j.z())};
		//Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lpl{T(last_point_l.x()), T(last_point_l.y()), T(last_point_l.z())};
		//Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lpm{T(last_point_m.x()), T(last_point_m.y()), T(last_point_m.z())};
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> ljm{T(ljm_norm.x()), T(ljm_norm.y()), T(ljm_norm.z())};

		//Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_last_curr{q[3], T(s) * q[0], T(s) * q[1], T(s) * q[2]};
		Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_last_curr{q[3], q[0], q[1], q[2]};
		Eigen::Quaternion<T> q_identity{T(1), T(0), T(0), T(0)};
		q_last_curr = q_identity.slerp(T(s), q_last_curr);
		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> t_last_curr{T(s) * t[0], T(s) * t[1], T(s) * t[2]};

		Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> lp;
		lp = q_last_curr * cp + t_last_curr;

		residual[0] = (lp - lpj).dot(ljm);

		return true;
	}

	static ceres::CostFunction *Create(const Eigen::Vector3d curr_point_, const Eigen::Vector3d last_point_j_,
									   const Eigen::Vector3d last_point_l_, const Eigen::Vector3d last_point_m_,
									   const double s_)
	{
		return (new ceres::AutoDiffCostFunction<
				LidarPlaneFactor, 1, 4, 3>(
			new LidarPlaneFactor(curr_point_, last_point_j_, last_point_l_, last_point_m_, s_)));
	}

	Eigen::Vector3d curr_point, last_point_j, last_point_l, last_point_m;
	Eigen::Vector3d ljm_norm;
	double s;
};

Ž®ľž†Ä structŽ•ľ žÉĚžĄĪŪē† ŽēĆ žĚīž†Ą surface point 3ÍįúŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī normal directionžĚĄ Í≥ĄžāįŪēúŽč§.

LidarPlaneFactor(Eigen::Vector3d curr_point_, Eigen::Vector3d last_point_j_,
                    Eigen::Vector3d last_point_l_, Eigen::Vector3d last_point_m_, double s_)
    : curr_point(curr_point_), last_point_j(last_point_j_), last_point_l(last_point_l_),
        last_point_m(last_point_m_), s(s_)
{
    ljm_norm = (last_point_j - last_point_l).cross(last_point_j - last_point_m);
    ljm_norm.normalize();
}

OperatoržóźžĄúŽäĒ residualžĚĄ Í≥ĄžāįŪēėÍ≥†, Žßąžį¨ÍįÄžßÄŽ°ú CreatžóźžĄúŽäĒ AutoDiffCostFunctionžĚĄ žĚīžö©ŪēúŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú AutoDiffCostFunction<function, no1, no2, no3> žĚīŽüįžčĚžúľŽ°ú corneržóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽŹĄ ÍįôžĚÄ Ž¨łŽ≤ēžĚī žĚīžö©ŽźúŽč§. Corneržóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ:

  • return (new ceres::AutoDiffCostFunction<LidarEdgeFactor, 3, 4, 3>(new LidarEdgeFactor(curr_point_, last_point_a_, last_point_b_, s_))); Surfacežóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ:
  • return (new ceres::AutoDiffCostFunction<LidarPlaneFactor, 1, 4, 3>(new LidarPlaneFactor(curr_point_, last_point_j_, last_point_l_, last_point_m_, s_)));

Ž•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒŽćį, žąęžěźžĚė žĚėŽĮłÍįÄ Ž≠ėÍĻĆ?

  • no1: CorneržĚė residualžĚė Ž≤°ŪĄį ŪĀ¨ÍłįŽäĒ 3žĚīÍ≥†, SurfacežĚė residualžĚė Ž≤°ŪĄį ŪĀ¨ÍłįŽäĒ 1žĚīŽčą, no1žĚÄ residualžĚė Ž≤°ŪĄį ŪĀ¨ÍłįŽ•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīŽ©į
  • no2, no3: ÍįĀ parameter blockžĚė ŪĀ¨ÍłįŽ•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāłŽč§.

AddResidualBlockžóźžĄú ž∂ĒÍįÄŽźú parameter blockžĚÄ para_q, para_tžĚīÍłįžóź, quaternionžóź ŪēīŽčĻŽźėŽäĒ 4žôÄ translationžóź ŪēīŽčĻŽźėŽäĒ 3žĚī ž∂ĒÍįÄŽźú Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

problem.AddResidualBlock(cost_function, loss_function, para_q, para_t);

Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† optimizationžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēīž§ÄŽč§.

if ((corner_correspondence + plane_correspondence) < 10)
{
    printf("less correspondence! *************************************************\n");
}

TicToc t_solver;
ceres::Solver::Options options;
options.linear_solver_type = ceres::DENSE_QR;
options.max_num_iterations = 4;
options.minimizer_progress_to_stdout = false;
ceres::Solver::Summary summary;
ceres::Solve(options, &problem, &summary);
printf("solver time %f ms \n", t_solver.toc());

CorneržôÄ plane correspondence žąėÍįÄ 10Ž≥īŽč§ žěĎžúľŽ©ī žßĄŪĖČŪēėžßÄ žēäŽäĒŽč§.

SolverŽäĒ Linear solverŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©į Maximum iterationžĚÄ 4Ž°ú ž†úŪēúŪēúŽč§.

žĚīž†Ąžóź para_qžôÄ para_tÍįÄ žôú updateÍįÄ žēąŽźėŽāė žč∂žóąŽäĒŽćį, optimizationžĚĄ ŽŹĆŽ¶¨Ž©īžĄú ÍįížĚī Ž≥ÄŪēėŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

q_last_curr, t_last_currŽŹĄ updateŪēėŽäĒ Ūē®žąėÍįÄ žóÜÍłłŽěė Ž≠ĒÍįÄ ŪĖąŽäĒŽćį žēĄžėą ž†ēžĚėŽ•ľ Eigen::MapžúľŽ°ú ŽźėžĖīžěąŽč§.

Eigen::Map<Eigen::Quaterniond> q_last_curr(para_q);
Eigen::Map<Eigen::Vector3d> t_last_curr(para_t);

žÜĒÍĻĆ žěė Ž™®Ž•īÍ≤†žßÄŽßĆ, žēĄŽßą para_qÍįÄ updateŽźėŽ©ī žěźŽŹôžúľŽ°ú q_last_currŽŹĄ žóÖŽćįžĚīŪäł ŽźėŽäĒ Ž™®žĖĎžĚīŽč§.

Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† 10HzŽ°ú OdometeryŽ•ľ publishŪēėÍ≥†

nav_msgs::Odometry laserOdometry;
laserOdometry.header.frame_id = "/camera_init";
laserOdometry.child_frame_id = "/laser_odom";
laserOdometry.header.stamp = ros::Time().fromSec(timeSurfPointsLessFlat);
laserOdometry.pose.pose.orientation.x = q_w_curr.x();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.orientation.y = q_w_curr.y();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.orientation.z = q_w_curr.z();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.orientation.w = q_w_curr.w();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.position.x = t_w_curr.x();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.position.y = t_w_curr.y();
laserOdometry.pose.pose.position.z = t_w_curr.z();
pubLaserOdometry.publish(laserOdometry);

geometry_msgs::PoseStamped laserPose;
laserPose.header = laserOdometry.header;
laserPose.pose = laserOdometry.pose.pose;
laserPath.header.stamp = laserOdometry.header.stamp;
laserPath.poses.push_back(laserPose);
laserPath.header.frame_id = "/camera_init";
pubLaserPath.publish(laserPath);

1HzŽ°ú point cloudŽ•ľ publishŪēúŽč§.

if (frameCount % skipFrameNum == 0)
{
    frameCount = 0;

    sensor_msgs::PointCloud2 laserCloudCornerLast2;
    pcl::toROSMsg(*laserCloudCornerLast, laserCloudCornerLast2);
    laserCloudCornerLast2.header.stamp = ros::Time().fromSec(timeSurfPointsLessFlat);
    laserCloudCornerLast2.header.frame_id = "/camera";
    pubLaserCloudCornerLast.publish(laserCloudCornerLast2);

    sensor_msgs::PointCloud2 laserCloudSurfLast2;
    pcl::toROSMsg(*laserCloudSurfLast, laserCloudSurfLast2);
    laserCloudSurfLast2.header.stamp = ros::Time().fromSec(timeSurfPointsLessFlat);
    laserCloudSurfLast2.header.frame_id = "/camera";
    pubLaserCloudSurfLast.publish(laserCloudSurfLast2);

    sensor_msgs::PointCloud2 laserCloudFullRes3;
    pcl::toROSMsg(*laserCloudFullRes, laserCloudFullRes3);
    laserCloudFullRes3.header.stamp = ros::Time().fromSec(timeSurfPointsLessFlat);
    laserCloudFullRes3.header.frame_id = "/camera";
    pubLaserCloudFullRes.publish(laserCloudFullRes3);
}

entry.title: Extrinsic calibration of omnidirectional camera using factor graph

link.title: Extrinsic calibration of omnidirectional camera using factor graph

entry.content:
Omnidirectional camera (žĚīŪēė omni camera) žĚė extrinsic calibration žĚĄ ŪēėŽäĒŽćį žěąžĖī ‚ÄúŽĆÄž∂© Í≤ĻžĻėÍ≤†žßÄ‚ÄĚ žÉĚÍįĀžĚĄ ŪēėÍ≥† žßĄŪĖČžĚĄ ŪĖąžúľŽāė.. žÉĚÍįĀŽ≥īŽč§ ŽßéžĚī Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄžßÄ žēäÍ≥†, ŽėźŪēú Íłįž°ī OpenCVŽāė Caltech calibration toolboxžóźžĄú multi-camera systemžóźžĄú žĚīŽü¨Ūēú Í≤Ĺžöįžóź ŽĆÄŪēī calibrationŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēžóź ŽĆÄŪēī ŽßéžĚī ŽāėžôÄžěąžßÄ žēäžĚÄ Í≤É ÍįôžēĄ ÍįúžĚłž†ĀžúľŽ°ú ÍįúŽįúŪēėÍ≤Ć ŽźėžóąŽč§. žöįžĄ† žā¨žö©Ūēú omni cameraŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

Omni cameraŽäĒ Fliržā¨žĚė Ladybug 5+ Ž™®ŽćłŽ°ú, horizontal Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°ú 5ÍįúžĚė cameraÍįÄ žěąžúľŽ©į, ÍįĀÍįĀ ÍīĎÍįĀ Ž†Ćž¶ąŽ•ľ ŪÉĎžě¨Ūēėžó¨ ž°įÍłąžĒ© Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄÍ≤Ć ŽźėžĖīžěąžúľŽ©į žõźŽ≥ł žėĀžÉĀžĚÄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

žúĄžĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚė ž≤ęŽ≤ąžßł ŪĖČ žôľž™ĹŽ∂ÄŪĄį žė§Ž•łž™ĹÍĻĆžßÄ camera 0, 1, 2žĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚīŽ©į ŽĎźŽ≤ąžßł ŪĖČžĚė žôľž™ĹŽ∂ÄŪĄį žė§Ž•łž™ĹÍĻĆžßÄÍįÄ 3, 4, 5žĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚīŽč§. camera 0, 1, 2, 3, 4ÍįÄ horizontal cameraŽď§žĚīŽ©į, camera 5ÍįÄ žúĄŽ•ľ ŽįĒŽĚľŽ≥īÍ≥† žěąŽč§.

žĚīŽ•ľ žĚīŽĆÄŽ°ú žā¨žö©ŪēėÍ≤Ć ŽźėŽ©ī ÍīĎÍįĀŽ†Ćž¶ąŽ°úŽ∂ÄŪĄį žė§ŽäĒ distortionžĚī žč¨Ūēī ŽĎź cameraÍįÄ Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂Ąžóź ŽĆÄŪēú marker žĚłžčĚžĚī žěė žēąŽź† ŽŅźŽćĒŽü¨ žĚłžčĚžĚī ŽźėŽćĒŽĚľŽŹĄ žěėŽ™ĽŽźú ÍįížĚĄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīžóąŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú žöįžĄ† undistortŽ•ľ žßĄŪĖČŪēėÍ≥† calibrationžĚĄ ŪēėÍłįŽ°ú ŪēėžėÄŽč§.

ÍįĀ cameražóź ŽĆÄŪēī intrinsic calibrationžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēú ŪõĄ undistortionžĚĄ Ūēú Í≤įÍ≥ľžĚīŽč§. žÉĚÍįĀŽ≥īŽč§ Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚī ÍĪįžĚė žóÜŽč§! OpenCVžĚė getOptimalNewCameraMatrix Ūē®žąėŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī žěėŽ¶¨žßÄ žēäžĚÄ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄŽŹĄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāėÍ≤Ć Ūēīž£ľŽäĒ žÉąŽ°úžöī camera matrixŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨Ūē† žąė žěąžóąŽč§.


cv::getOptimalNewCameraMatrix(Camera matrix from intrinsic calibration, 
                              Distortion coefficient from intrinsic calibration, 
                              Input image size,
                              alpha,
                              Output image size,
                              Valid ROI,
                              Center principal point (t/f));

žúĄžĚė žĹĒŽďúžóźžĄú alphaÍįížĚÄ 0žóźžĄú 1 žā¨žĚīžĚė žąėžĚłŽćį, 0žóź ÍįÄÍĻĆžõĆžßąžąėŽ°Ě distortionžĚī žóÜŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄŽßĆ žěėŽĚľžĄú Ž≥īžó¨ž£ľŽ©į, 1žóź ÍįÄÍĻĆžõĆžßąžąėŽ°Ě žõźŽ≥ł žėĀžÉĀžĚī Ž™®ŽĎź ŽāėŪÉÄŽāúŽč§. žúĄžĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚī 0žĚľŽēĆžĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚīŽ©į 1žĚľŽēĆžĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚÄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

ÍįĀ cameraÍįÄ ŽĻĄžä∑Ūē†ÍļľŽĚľ žÉĚÍįĀŪĖąŽäĒŽćį žēĄŽčąžóąŽč§! (žÉĚÍįĀŪēīŽ≥īŽ©ī ŽčĻžóįŪēėŽč§. žúĄŽ•ľ Ž≥īŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚÄ ÍįĀ cameražôÄ 90ŽŹĄŽāė žį®žĚīŽāėŽčą‚Ä¶ horizontal Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°úŽŹĄ Ž™®ŽĎź žį®žĚīÍįÄ žěąžĚĆžĚĄ žēĆ žąė žěąŽč§.) ÍįĀ žėĀžÉĀžóźžĄú ŽĄ§Ž™®Ž°ú ž≥źžßĄ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚī žúĄžĚė žĹĒŽďúžóźžĄú valid roižóź ŽĆÄŪēú Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚīŽ©į, žĚīŽ•ľ žěėŽĚľŽāīŽ©ī 0žĚľŽēĆžĚė žėĀžÉĀžĚī ŽāėŪÉÄŽāúŽč§.

žó¨Ūäľ, žĚľŽč® Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚī žěąžĖīžēľ ŪĖąÍłįžóź žöłŽ©į Í≤®žěźŽ®ĻÍłįŽ°ú distortion effectÍįÄ ž°įÍłą ŽćúŪēėÍłįŽ•ľ ŽįĒŽĚľŽ©į alphaŽ•ľ 0.3žúľŽ°ú ŪēīžĄú calibrationžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪĖąŽč§. žėĀžÉĀÍįĄ overlapping regionžĚī ÍĶČžě•Ūěą žěĎžēėÍłįžóź, Íłįž°īžĚė checkerboard ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŪēėŽ©ī ÍįĀ žėĀžÉĀžóźžĄú checkerboardÍįÄ Ž™®ŽĎź Ž≥īžĚīžßÄ žēäžēĄ žėĀžÉĀÍįĄ correspondenceÍįÄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāėžßÄ žēäžēĄ ŽĆÄžč† Aruco markerŽ•ľ ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú marker detectionžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī correspondenceŽ•ľ žįĺÍłįŽ°ú ŪēėžėÄŽč§.

ÍįĀÍłį Žč§Ž•ł marker idŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßĄ Aruco marker 8ÍįúŽ•ľ ŪŹČŪŹČŪēú ŪĆźžóź Ž∂Äžį©Ūēėžó¨ žėĀžÉĀžĚĄ ž∑®ŽďĚŪēėžėÄŽč§. Valid ROI ŽāīŽ∂Äžóź žēĄž£ľ ž°įÍłąžĚīŽāėŽßą Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄŽäĒ Í≤ÉžúľŽ°ú Ž≥īžĚīžßÄŽßĆ, ÍīĎÍįĀžĚī ŽćĒ ŽĄďžĚÄ top viewžôÄ Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚĄ žįĺŽäĒÍĪī žēĄŽěė žĚīŽĮłžßÄžôÄ ÍįôžĚī ŽćĒ ŽčĶžĚī žóÜžóąŽč§.

Camera 5žôÄ Žč§Ž•ł cameraÍįĄžĚė extrinsic calibrationžĚĄ žúĄŪēī ŽßąžĽ§Ž•ľ Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄÍ≤Ć ŪēėŽäĒÍĪī valid roi žôłŽ∂ÄŽ°ú Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄÍ≤Ć ŪēėŽäĒ žąė ŽįĖžóź žóÜžóąŽč§. žó¨ŪēėŪäľ žĚīŽ†áÍ≤Ć žĖĽžĖīžßĄ correspondenceŽď§žĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī extrinsic calibrationžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēīžēľ ŽźėŽäĒŽćį, OpenCVŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī extrinsic calibrationžĚĄ ŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēžĚÄ stereo camera calibrationžóź ŽĆÄŪēú Žį©Ž≤ēŽßĆ žĻúž†ąŪěą žĄ§Ž™ÖŽźėžĖīžěąžúľŽ©į, 3ŽĆÄ žĚīžÉĀžĚė cameražóź ŽĆÄŪēī calibrationŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēžóź ŽĆÄŪēī žßĄŪĖČŪēú Í≤ĹžöįŽäĒ ŽßéžĚī Ž≥īžßÄ Ž™ĽŪēėžėÄŽč§. cv::omnidir::calibrateŽŹĄ žěąÍłįŽäĒ ŪēúŽćį, factor graphŽ°ú Ž®ľž†Ä ŪēúŽ≤ą žčúŽŹĄŪēīŽ≥īÍ≥† žĚīžö©ŪēīŽ≥īÍłįŽ°ú ŪēėžėÄŽč§.

SLAMžóźžĄú measurementŽ•ľ ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú statežôÄ landmarkŽ•ľ updateŽ•ľ ŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēÍ≥ľ ŽĻĄžä∑ŪēėŽ©īžĄúŽŹĄ Žč§Ž•īÍ≤Ć, stateŽäĒ 6ÍįúžĚė cameraŽ°ú Í≥†ž†ēŪēīŽÜďÍ≥† observationŽď§žĚĄ Žč§ ŽēĆŽ†§ ŽĄ£žĚÄ Ží§ optimizationŪēėŽäĒ Žį©žčĚžĚīŽč§. (Bundle adjustmentžóź ŽćĒ ÍįÄÍĻĚŽč§Í≥† Ž≥ľ žąė žěąŽč§. toolŽßĆ factor graphŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēúÍĪįžßÄ..) Factor graphŽäĒ gtsamžĚĄ žā¨žö©Ūēėžó¨ ÍĶ¨ŪėĄŪēėžėÄŽč§.

InitialŽď§žĚÄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

  1. Camera state initials: žīąÍłį camera stateŽď§žĚÄ camera centreÍįÄ Ž™®ŽĎź Í≤Ļž≥źž†łžěąÍ≥†, camera 0žĚĄ (1, 0, 0) ŪĖ•ŪēėÍ≤Ć Ūēú Ží§ 0Ž∂ÄŪĄį 4ÍĻĆžßÄ 360ŽŹĄŽ•ľ 5Ž°ú ŽāėŽąĄžĖī ÍįĀÍįĀ 5Íįú Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°ú Ž≥īÍ≤Ć Ūēú Ží§ camera 5Ž•ľ (0, 0, 1)Ž°ú ŪĖ•ŪēėÍ≤Ć ŪēėžėÄŽč§. ÍįĀ cameražĚė z Žį©ŪĖ•žĚĄ žēěžĄú žĖłÍłČŪēú Í≤ÉÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī žĄ§ž†ēŪēú Ží§ x, y Žį©ŪĖ•žĚÄ camera žėĀžÉĀžĚĄ Ž≥īŽ©į Žßěž∂įž§¨Žč§. (gtsam::Pose3)
  2. Landmark initials: LandmarkŽď§žĚÄ markeržĚė ÍįĀ cornerž†źŽď§žĚė 3žį®žõź pointŽ°ú žā¨žö©ŪēėžėÄŽč§ (gtsam::Point3). Ž®ľž†Ä žėĀžÉĀžóźžĄú detectŽźú ŽßąžĽ§Ž•ľ ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú solvepnpŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽßąžĽ§žĚė camera žÉĀŽĆÄžúĄžĻėŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨Ūēú Žč§žĚĆ, camera poseŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī global žĘĆŪĎúÍ≥ĄžóźžĄúžĚė marker cornerž†źŽď§žĚĄ Í≥ĄžāįŪēī initial Ž°ú ŽĄ£žóąŽč§.

FactorŽď§žĚÄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

  1. Projection factor: LandmarkŽď§žĚī ÍįĀ camera žėĀžÉĀžóź žĖīŽĒĒžóź žúĄžĻėŪĖąŽäĒžßÄžĚė measurementŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī factorŽ•ľ ÍĶ¨žĄĪŪēėžėÄŽč§. (gtsam::GenericProjectionFactor)
  2. Range factor: ŪēúÍįúžĚė markeržóź ŽĆÄŪēī 4ÍįúžĚė cornerž†źÍįĄžĚė ÍĪįŽ¶¨Ž•ľ žēĆÍłįžóź range factorŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėžėÄŽč§. ÍįĀ ŽßąžĽ§ŽßąŽč§ 6ÍįúžĚė factorŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪĖąŽäĒŽćį, corner 0Ž∂ÄŪĄį 3žóź ŽĆÄŪēī 0-1, 1-2, 2-3, 3-0, 0-2, 1-3 žĚīŽüįžčĚžúľŽ°ú global spacežóźžĄúžĚė ÍĪįŽ¶¨Ž•ľ žßÄž†ēŪēīž£ľžóąŽč§.

Range factorŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėÍłį ž†Ą, Vladlen Koltun Žįēžā¨Žčė žēĄŽěėžóźžĄú žĚľŪēėžčúŽäĒ žĚīŽ∂ĄžĚī Ūēėžč† žĚľžĚė Žį©Ž≤ēžóźžĄú BetweenFactorPoint3Ž•ľ žĚīžö©ŪēīŽī§ŽäĒŽćį, žĚīŽäĒ world žĘĆŪĎúÍ≥ĄžóźžĄú ÍįĀ ž†źŽď§žĚė žÉĀŽĆÄžúĄžĻėŽ•ľ fixŪēīŽ≤ĄŽ¶¨ŽäĒ Žį©žčĚžĚīŽĚľ ž†ĀŪē©ŪēėžßÄ žēäžēėŽč§.

Camera 0Ž∂ÄŪĄį 5ŽäĒ ÍįĀÍįĀ ŽĻ®ÍįĄžÉČ žīąŽ°ĚžÉČ ŪĆĆŽěÄžÉČ Ž≥īŽĚľžÉČ Í≤ÄžĚÄžÉČ žčúžēą(Cyan)žÉČžúľŽ°ú ŪĎúŪėĄŽźėžĖīžěąžúľŽ©į, žĄ†Ž∂ĄžĚė ŽĀĚžĚė ž†źŽď§žĚī camera centreŽ•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāłŽč§. Camera centreÍįÄ Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄžßÄ žēäÍłįžóź žôĄŽ≤ĹŪēú panorama imageÍįÄ žÉĚžĄĪŽźėžßÄ žēäžĚĆžĚĄ žēĆ žąė žěąŽč§.

ž†Ąž≤ī 6Íįú cameražóźžĄú ŽßąžĽ§ÍįÄ detectŽźú cameražĚė ÍįĮžąėÍįÄ 2Íįú žĚīžÉĀžĚľ Í≤Ĺžöį measurementŽ•ľ ŽĄ£ŽäĒ Žį©žčĚžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŪēėžėÄŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú markerÍįĄ ÍĪįŽ¶¨Ž°úŽßĆ distance factorŽ•ľ ž§Ą Í≤Ĺžöį ÍįôžĚÄ ŪŹČŽ©īžóź žěąŽč§ŽĚľŽäĒ ž†źžĚĄ Ūôúžö©ŪēėžßÄ Ž™ĽŪēėÍłįžóź, camera pose žĚīžôÄžĚė board poseŽ•ľ ŽÖłŽďúŽ°ú ž∂ĒÍįÄŪēėÍ≥† board posežóźžĄú ŽįĒŽĚľŽ≥ł ÍįĀ marker corneržĚė ž†źžĚė 3žį®žõź žúĄžĻėžóź ŽĆÄŪēú factorŽ•ľ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪēėŽäĒ Žį©žčĚžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŪēėžėÄŽč§.

MeasurementÍįÄ 3žį®žõź coordinatesžĚł factorÍįÄ žóÜÍłįžóź žÉąŽ°ú ŽßĆŽď§ÍĻĆ žč∂žóąžßÄŽßĆ, žčúÍįĄžÉĀ žõźŽěė ž°īžě¨ŪēėŽäĒ BearingRangeFactorŽ•ľ Ūôúžö©Ūēī boardžôÄ landmark (marker corner)ÍįĄ factorŽ•ľ ŪėēžĄĪŪēėžėÄŽč§. žó¨ÍłįžĄú ž†ēŪôēŪěą BearingRangeFactorÍįÄ žēĄŽčĆ Ž≠ĒÍįÄ solidŪēú constraintŽ•ľ ž£ľŽäĒÍ≤Ć žõźŪēī ŽßěŽäĒŽćį, žĚľŽč® measurement noiseŽ•ľ žēĄž£ľ žěĎÍ≤Ć žĄ§ž†ēŪēėÍ≥† žßĄŪĖČŪēėžėÄŽč§.

ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú žĚīž†ĄžóźŽäĒ camera ŽÖłŽďúžôÄ landmarkŽď§žĚī žßĀž†Ďž†ĀžúľŽ°ú žóįÍ≤įŽźú ŽįėŽ©ī, žĚīŽ≤ąžóźŽäĒ camera-board ÍįĄ relative pose factor, board-landmark ÍįĄ bearing range factor, landmark-cameraÍįĄ projection factorŽ°ú ŪėēžĄĪŪēėžėÄŽč§.

entry.summary: Omnidirectional camera (žĚīŪēė omni camera) žĚė extrinsic calibration žĚĄ ŪēėŽäĒŽćį žěąžĖī ‚ÄúŽĆÄž∂© Í≤ĻžĻėÍ≤†žßÄ‚ÄĚ žÉĚÍįĀžĚĄ ŪēėÍ≥† žßĄŪĖČžĚĄ ŪĖąžúľŽāė.. žÉĚÍįĀŽ≥īŽč§ ŽßéžĚī Í≤Ļž≥źžßÄžßÄ žēäÍ≥†, ŽėźŪēú Íłįž°ī OpenCVŽāė Caltech calibration toolboxžóźžĄú multi-camera systemžóźžĄú žĚīŽü¨Ūēú Í≤Ĺžöįžóź ŽĆÄŪēī calibrationŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēžóź ŽĆÄŪēī ŽßéžĚī ŽāėžôÄžěąžßÄ žēäžĚÄ Í≤É ÍįôžēĄ ÍįúžĚłž†ĀžúľŽ°ú ÍįúŽįúŪēėÍ≤Ć ŽźėžóąŽč§. žöįžĄ† žā¨žö©Ūēú omni cameraŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

entry.title: LCCNet (2021 CVPR)
entry.content:
LCCNet: LiDAR and Camera Self-Calibration using Cost Volume Network

ŪēėžĖľŽĻą Í≥ĶÍ≥ľŽĆÄ

Overviewžóź Žāėžė® Í≤Éž≤ėŽüľ RGBžôÄ LiDAR projectionžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēú Depth mapžĚĄ žĚīžö©Ūēī IterativeŪēú Žį©Ž≤ēžúľŽ°ú Calibration ŪēúŽč§.

Abstract

Multi-sensor fusionžĚÄ self-driving ŽįŹ robot navigationžóźžĄú 3D reconstruction ŽįŹ perceptionžĚĄ ŪĖ•žÉĀŪēúŽč§. SensorÍįĄ calibrationžĚÄ Ūö®Í≥ľž†ĀžĚł multi-sensor fusionžĚĄ žúĄŪēú Íłįž†Äž°įÍĪīžĚīŽč§. Íłįž°īžóźŽäĒ LiDAR-cameraÍįĄ calibrationžĚĄ žúĄŪēī žąėŽŹôž†ĀžĚīÍ≥† ŪěėŽď§Ž©į Ž≥Ķžě°Ūēú calibration ŪôėÍ≤ĹžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźėžĖīžôĒŽč§. žöįŽ¶¨ŽäĒ Íłįž°ī CNN ÍłįŽįėÍ≥ľŽäĒ Žč§Ž•ł online LiDAR-Camera Self-calibration Network (LCCNet)žĚĄ ž†úžēąŪēúŽč§. LCCNetžĚÄ end-to-endŽ°ú trainingžĚī Žź† žąė žěąžúľŽ©į extrinsic parameterŽ•ľ real-timežúľŽ°ú ž∂Ēž†ēŪē† žąė žěąŽč§. LCCNetžóźžĄú žöįŽ¶¨ŽäĒ RGB image featureŽď§Í≥ľ Depth imageÍįĄ correlationžĚĄ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāīŽäĒ cost volume layerŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēúŽč§. ž∂Ēž†ēŽźú extrinsic parameteržĚė supervised signalžĚł smooth L1-loss žôłžóźŽŹĄ self-supervised signalžĚł point cloud distance lossÍįÄ training Žč®Í≥ĄžóźžĄú ŽŹĄžěÖŽźúŽč§. Extrinsic parameterŽ•ľ žßĀž†Ď regressŪēėŽäĒ ŽĆÄžč† decalibrated deviationžĚĄ ground truthžôÄ initial calibrationžóźžĄú ž∂Ēž†ēŪēúŽč§ (decalibrated deviationžĚī Ž≠źžßÄ). Calibration errorŽäĒ iterative refinementžôÄ inference stagežóźžĄú temporal filtering approachŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ÍįźžÜĆŪēúŽč§. ÍįĀ iterationžóźžĄú Žč®žĚľ GPUžóźžĄú 24msžĚė žčúÍįĄžĚī žÜĆžöĒŽźúŽč§. LCCNetžĚÄ KITTIžóźžĄú miscalibrationžĚī žĶúŽĆÄ \(\pm\) 1.5m žôÄ \(\pm\) 20¬įžĚł žÉĀŪô©žóźžĄú ŪŹČÍ∑† 0.297mžôÄ 0.017¬įžĚė žóźŽü¨Ž•ľ ŽāėŪÉÄŽāī SOTA CNN ÍłįŽįė žēĆÍ≥†Ž¶¨ž¶ėŽ≥īŽč§ ŽćĒ ŽāėžĚÄ Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ Ž≥īžĚłŽč§. žĹĒŽďú

Introduction

žßÄŽāú Ž™áŽÖĄÍįĄ autonomous driving Íłįžą†žĚÄ ÍłČžÜćŽŹĄŽ°ú Žįúž†ĄŪēīžôĒŽč§. Autonomous driving ŪôėÍ≤ĹžĚÄ Ž≥Ķžě°ŪēėÍ≥† Žß§žöį ŽŹôž†ĀžĚīÍłįžóź žĄľžĄú ŪēėŽāėŽ°úŽäĒ Ž™®Žď† žčúŽāėŽ¶¨žė§žóźžĄú žēąž†ēŽźú perceptionžĚĄ ž†úÍ≥ĶŪē† žąė žóÜŽč§. LiDAR-camera fusionžĚÄ ž£ľŽ≥Ä ŪôėÍ≤Ĺžóź ŽĆÄŪēī žēąž†ēŽźėÍ≥† ž†ēŪôēŪēú perception ŽįŹ 3D reconstruction Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßą žąė žěąÍ≤Ć ŪēúŽč§. žĚīŽäĒ ž†ēŽįÄŪēú extrinsic calibrationžóź Í∑ľÍįĄžĚĄ ŽĎźÍ≥† žěąŽč§. LiDAR point cloudžôÄ camera imageŽäĒ heterogeneous žĚīžĘÖžĚė ŽćįžĚīŪĄįžĚīŽč§. Point cloudŽäĒ sparse 3D datažĚł ŽįėŽ≥Ä imageŽäĒ dense 2D datažĚīÍłįžóź ž†ēŽįÄŪēú calibrationžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēú 2D-3D matchingžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźúŽč§.

Íłįž°ī ž≤īžĽ§Ž≥īŽďúžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ žĚłÍ≥Ķž†ĀžĚł ŽßąžĽ§Ž•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēú calibration ÍłįŽ≤ēžĚÄ ŽÖłŽŹôŽ†• ŽįŹ žčúÍįĄžĚī žÜĆžöĒŽźėÍ≥† offline Žį©žčĚžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŽŹľ self-driving car productionžóź ž†ĀŪē©ŪēėžßÄ žēäŽč§. Vehicle operation ž§Ď sensorÍįĄ calibrationžĚī ŪčÄžĖīž†ł re-calibrationžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźúŽč§. žĶúÍ∑ľ Ž™áŽ™á žóįÍĶ¨Žď§žĚÄ targetless ŪôėÍ≤ĹžóźžĄú fully autonomous calibrationžóź žßĎž§ĎŪēúŽč§. ŪēėžßÄŽßĆ ŽĆÄŽ∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚė self-calibration ÍłįŽ≤ēŽď§žĚÄ ŪäĻž†ē ŪôėÍ≤ĹžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźėŽ©į offline-calibrationžóź ŽĻĄŪēī ž†ēŪôēŽŹĄÍįÄ ŽÜížßÄ žēäŽč§. Ž™áŽ™á žóįÍĶ¨žěźŽď§žĚÄ DLžĚĄ ž†Āžö©Ūēėžó¨ 6žěźžú†ŽŹĄ rigid body transformationžĚĄ ž∂Ēž†ēŪēėžėÄŽč§. žĚīŽü¨Ūēú Žį©Ž≤ēŽď§žĚÄ imagežôÄ point cloudžĚė featureÍįĄ correlationžĚĄ Í≥†Ž†§ŪēėžßÄ žēäÍ≥† ŽįĒŽ°ú žúĶŪē©ŪēėŽäĒ Žį©žčĚžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŽźúŽč§. žĚī ŽÖľŽ¨łžĚÄ RGB camera-LiDAR calibrationžĚė žÉąŽ°úžöī ÍłįŽ≤ēžĚĄ žÜĆÍįúŪēúŽč§:

  • LCCNetžĚÄ novel end-to-end learning networkžěĄ. ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨ŽäĒ žĄłÍįÄžßÄŽ°ú ŽāėŽČ®: feature extraction network, feature matching layer, and global feature aggregation network. QuaternionžĚī trainingžčú GTŽ°ú žā¨žö©ŽźėžóąžúľŽ©į, GTžôÄ calibrationÍįĄ smooth L1-Loss žôłžóźŽŹĄ point cloud distance lossŽŹĄ ž†Āžö©ŽźėžóąŽč§.
  • Feature matching layerŽäĒ RGBžôÄ depth mapžĚė matching costŽ•ľ ž†Äžě•ŪēėŽäĒ const volumeŽ•ľ žÉĚžĄĪŪēúŽč§. LiDAR-camera elf-calibrationžóźžĄú žĶúžīąŽ°ú žĚīžĘÖ žĄľžĄúžĚė featureÍįĄ correlationžĚĄ Í≥†Ž†§ŪēėžėÄŽč§.
  • Calibration accuracyŽ•ľ ŽÜížĚīÍłį žúĄŪēī iterative refinementžôÄ multiple frames analysisÍįÄ ž†Āžö©ŽźėžóąŽč§. LCCNetžĚÄ Žč§Ž•ł SOTAŽ≥īŽč§ žĶúÍ≥†žĚė accuracy-speed trade-offŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßÄÍ≥† žěąŽč§.

Related work

LiDARžôÄ cameraÍįĄ calibrationžĚÄ 2D-3D registration problemžúľŽ°ú Ž∂ĄŽ•ėŽź† žąė žěąŽč§. CalibrationžĚÄ žĄłžĘÖŽ•ėŽ°ú ŽāėŽČúŽč§.

  1. Target-based methods
    1. Íłįž°ī calibration boardŽ•ľ žā¨žö©Ūēú ÍłįŽ≤ēŽď§: ÍĶ¨Ž©ćžĚĄ ŽöęžĖīžĄú ŪēėÍłįŽŹĄ ŪĖąžóąÍĶ¨Žāė
    2. Spherical targetžĚī ŽĻ†Ž•īÍ≥† ž†ēŪôēŪēú calibrationžóź žö©žĚīŪēėŽč§Í≥† ŪēúŽč§.
  2. Target-less methods
    1. Target žóÜžĚī Correspondence ŽėźŽäĒ gradient directionžúľŽ°ú ŪēėŽäĒ ÍłįŽ≤ēŽď§
  3. Learning-based methods
    1. RegNetžĚÄ CNNžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī 6žěźžú†ŽŹĄ extrinsic parameterŽ•ľ žįĺŽäĒŽč§.
    2. CalibNetžĚÄ geometrically supervised deep networkŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī žč§žčúÍįĄžúľŽ°ú 6žěźžú†ŽŹĄ Ž™®žÖėžĚĄ ž∂Ēž†ēŪēúŽč§. End-to-end trainingžĚÄ geometric, photometric consistencyŽ•ľ žĶúŽĆÄŪôĒ ŪēúŽč§.
    3. RGGNetžĚÄ Rimmaninan geometryžôÄ deep generative modelžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī tolerance-aware loss functionžĚĄ žÉĚžĄĪŪēúŽč§.
    4. SOICžĚÄ žĚīŽ•ľ Semantic centroidžĚė PNPŽ¨łž†úŽ°ú ŪēīžĄĚŪēėžėÄŽč§.
    5. Zhu et alžĚÄ extrinsic calibrationžĚĄ semantic featureŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēú optimization problemžúľŽ°ú ŪēīžĄĚŪēėžėÄŽč§. Ž≠ĒžÜĆŽ¶¨žßÄ

Method

CNNžĚĄ žā¨žö©Ūēú LiDAR-cameraÍįĄ 6žěźžú†ŽŹĄ extrinsic calibration

Input Processing

Initial extrinsic \(T_{init}\)Í≥ľ camera intrinsic \(K\)Ž•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī Depth imageŽ•ľ žÉĚžĄĪŪēúŽč§. žó¨ÍłįžĄú Z-buffer (depth buffer?) ÍłįŽ≤ēžĚĄ žĚīžö©Ūēī Ž≥īžĚīžßÄ žēäžĚÄ depth ÍįíŽď§žĚÄ ž≥źŽāīŽäĒŽďĮ.

Network Architecture

ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨ŽäĒ feature extraction network, matching layer, global aggregationžúľŽ°ú ŽāėŽČėŽäĒŽćį, ÍįĀ parameterÍįÄ differentiableŪēėÍłįžóź end-to-endÍįÄ ÍįÄŽä•ŪēėŽč§.

  1. Feature Extraction Network Feature extraction networkžĚÄ RGB imagežôÄ depth image feature extractionžĚĄ žúĄŪēú ŽĎźÍįúžĚė symmetric branchŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßÄÍ≥† žěąŽč§:
    • RGB Branch: pre-trained ResNet-18 without FCN
    • Depth branch: RGBŽěĎ ÍįôžúľŽāė RELUžóźžĄú Leaky RELUŽ•ľ activation functionžúľŽ°ú žā¨žö© (žĚīžú† žēąŽāėžėī)

  2. Feature Matching Layer RGB feature map \(x_{rgb}\)žôÄ depth feature map \(x_{lidar}\)ÍįĄ matching costŽ•ľ Í≥ĄžāįŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēī feature matching layerÍįÄ ž†Āžö©Žź®. PWC-NetžóźžĄú žėĀÍįźžĚĄ ŽįõžēĄ correlation layerŽ•ľ žā¨žö©Ūēī feature matchingŪē®. cost volumežĚĄ \(x_{rgb}\)žôÄ \(x_{lidar}\)žĚė correlationžúľŽ°ú ŽßĆŽď¶: \(cv(p_1, p_2) = \frac{1}{N}(c(x_{rgb}(p_1)))^\top c(x_{lidar}(p_2))\) žó¨ÍłįžĄú \(c(x)\)ŽäĒ feature map \(x\)žĚė flatten vectoržĚīŽ©į \(N\)žĚÄ column vector \(c(x)\)žĚė ÍłłžĚīžěĄ. ŪĒľž≥źŽď§žóź ŽĆÄŪēú cost volumežĚÄ limited range of d pixelžóźžĄú žĚīŽ£®žĖīž†łžēľŪē® (žôúžĚłžßÄŽäĒ žēąŽāėžėī) i.e., \(\vert p_1 - p_2 \vert _{\infty} \leq d\)

    Input feature mapžĚī ÍĶČžě•Ūěą žěĎÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź (Original imagežĚė 1/32) d=2Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŽź®. (Í≤įÍĶ≠ initial calibrationžĚī žěė ŽźėžĖīžěąžĖīžēľ ŽźėŽäĒÍĪį žēĄŽčė?) 3D cost volumežĚė dimensionžĚÄ \(d^2 \times H \times W\)žĚīŽ©į, \(H\)žôÄ \(W\)ŽäĒ feature map \(x_{rgb}\)žôÄ \(x_{lidar}\)žĚė heightžôÄ widthžěĄ.

  3. Feature Global Aggregation LCCNetžĚÄ 6žěźžú†ŽŹĄ rigid body transformationžĚĄ cost volume featureŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī regressŪēúŽč§. žĚī ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨ŽäĒ 512 neuronžĚĄ ÍįÄžßĄ FCNÍ≥ľ ŽĎźÍįúžĚė roatationÍ≥ľ translationžĚĄ ŽĆÄŪĎúŪēėŽäĒ stacked FCN branchŽ°ú žĚīŽ£®žĖīž°ĆŽč§. ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨ outputžĚÄ \(1\times 3\) tranlation vectoržôÄ \(1 \times 4\) quaternionžĚīŽč§.

Loss Function

RGB žĚīŽĮłžßÄžôÄ Depth imagežóź ŽĆÄŪēī ŽĎźÍįÄžßÄ lossŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēúŽč§: regression loss \(L_{T}\), point cloud distance loss \(L_{P}\) \(L = \lambda_T L_T + \lambda_P L_P\)

  1. Regreassion Loss Translation vectoržóź ŽĆÄŪēī smmoth L1 lossÍįÄ ž†Āžö©Žź®. L1 lossžĚė ŽĮłŽ∂ĄžĚÄ 0žóźžĄú uniqueŪēėžßÄ žēäžĚÄ ŽįėŽ©ī smooth L1 lossŽäĒ ž†úÍ≥ĪžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī near zerožóźžĄú ŽćĒ Ž∂ÄŽďúŽüĹŽč§. ŪöĆž†Ąžóź ŽĆÄŪēú lossžóź ŽĆÄŪēī quaternionžĚÄ ÍłįŽ≥łž†ĀžúľŽ°ú Žį©ŪĖ• ž†ēŽ≥īžĚīŽĮÄŽ°ú Euclidean distancežĚÄ ŽĎźÍįúžĚė quaternionžóź ŽĆÄŪēī ž†ēŪôēŪěą žĄ§Ž™ÖŪē† žąė žóÜŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú angular distanceŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūēī ŽĎź quaternionžĚė žį®žĚīŽ•ľ žĄ§Ž™ÖŪēėžėÄŽč§: \(L_R = D_a (q_{gt}, q_{pred})\) \(D_a\)ŽäĒ angular distancežĚīŽč§.

    ž†Ąž≤ī regression lossŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§: \(L_T = \lambda_t L_t + \lambda_q L_q\)

  2. Point Cloud Distance Loss Point cloud distance constrainŽŹĄ ž∂ĒÍįÄŽźėžóąŽč§. LiDAR point cloudŽď§ (\(P = \{ P_1, P_2, \dots, P_N \}\))žóź ŽĆÄŪēī loss \(L_P\)ŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī ž†ēžĚėŪēúŽč§. \(L_P = \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^{N} \lVert T_{LC}^{-1} \cdot T_{pred}^{-1} \cdot T_{init} \cdot P_i - P_i\rVert_2\)

    žĚīŽ∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚī žĚīŪēīÍįÄ žēąŽźėŽäóŽćį, žį¨žį¨Ūěą ŽīźŽ≥īžěź.

         for i in range(len(point_clouds)):
         point_cloud_gt = point_clouds[i].to(transl_err.device)
         point_cloud_out = point_clouds[i].clone()

         R_target = quat2mat(target_rot[i])
         T_target = tvector2mat(target_transl[i])
         RT_target = torch.mm(T_target, R_target)

         R_predicted = quat2mat(rot_err[i])
         T_predicted = tvector2mat(transl_err[i])
         RT_predicted = torch.mm(T_predicted, R_predicted)

         RT_total = torch.mm(RT_target.inverse(), RT_predicted)

         point_cloud_out = rotate_forward(point_cloud_out, RT_total)

         error = (point_cloud_out - point_cloud_gt).norm(dim=0)
         error.clamp(100.)
         total_loss += error.mean()

    žĹĒŽďúžóźžĄú Žāėžė§ŽäĒ point_cloud_outžĚī \(T_{LC}^{-1} \cdot T_{pred}^{-1} \cdot T_{init} \cdot P_i\)ŽĚľŽäĒ ÍĪīŽćį, žĚīÍĪł point_cloud_gtŽěĎ ŽĻľŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ Ž≥īŽčą.. Í∑łŽÉ• žĻīŽ©ĒŽĚľ coordinatežóźžĄú ŽįĒŽĚľŽ≥ł point cloudžĚė prediction - gtžĚłÍįÄ? žė§ŪÉÄžĚłŽďĮ? Ž™®Ž•īÍ≤†Žč§.

Calibration Inference and Refinement

Extrinsic parameterŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§: \(\hat{T}_{LC} = T_{pred}^{-1}\cdot T_{init}\)

žó¨ÍłįžĄú Žč§žĖĎŪēú rangežóź ŽĆÄŪēī Žč§žĖĎŪēú networkžĚĄ trainingžčúŪā®Žč§.

1.5m, 1.0m, 0.5, 0.2m, 0.1m, Í∑łŽ¶¨Í≥† 20¬į, 10¬į, 5¬į, 2¬į, 1¬įÍĻĆžßÄ rangeŽ•ľ ŽßĆŽď§Í≥†, Žāėž§ĎžĚė žěĎžĚÄ rangeŽäĒ maximum mean absolute error (MAE)Ž•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī Í≤įž†ēŪĖąŽč§Í≥† ŪēúŽč§ (Í≤įÍ≥ľžóź ŽĒįŽĚľ ž†ēŽįÄŪēú calibrationžĚĄ žúĄŪēú trainingžĚłŽďĮ).

žó¨Ūäľ 1.5m, 20¬įŽ°ú trainŽźú networkŽ•ľ žčúžěĎžúľŽ°ú Žč§žĚĆ range, Žč§žĚĆ rangeŽ°ú Žč§žčú ŽĄ£žĖī žĶúžĘÖ extrinsic calibrationžĚÄ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§: \(\hat{T}_{LC} = (T_0 \cdot T_1 \dots T_5)^{-1}\cdot T_{init}\)

Experiments and Discussion

Data Preparation

KITTI odometry dataŽ•ľ žĚīžö©ŪĖąžĚĆ. LiDARžôÄ left color camera žā¨žö© 01~20ÍĻĆžßÄ train & validation, 00žĚĄ testset. 200ŪĒĄŽěėžěĄ ž†úžôł Ž™®ŽĎź spatially independentŪē®. Random deviationžĚĄ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪēīžĄú data ž∂ĒÍįÄ: \(T_{init} = \Delta T \cdot T_{LC}\)

Evaluation Metrics

Translation: L2 norm žā¨žö©

Rotation: Quaternion angle distance žā¨žö©

Traiing Details

Adam Optimizer with initial learning rate of \(3e^{-4}\). Two Nvidia GP100 GPU with batch size 120 and total epochs 120. Large-range modelžĚī pre-trained modelŽ°ú žā¨žö©Žź®. largestŽäĒ 120, žěĎžĚÄ Í≤ÉŽď§žĚÄ 50žúľŽ°ú epochÍįÄ žĄ§ž†ēŽź®.

Results and Discussion

žěĎžĚÄ ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨Ž°ú žßĄŪĖČŽź† žąėŽ°Ě žěĎžēĄžßÄŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ Ž≥ľ žąė žěąžĚĆ.

Random initial parameteržóź ŽĆÄŪēī calibrationžĚī žěė Žź®žĚĄ žēĆ žąė žěąžĚĆ.

Conclusion

entry.title: LiDAR Projection
entry.content:
LiDAR - camera calibration programžĚĄ ž†úžěĎŪēėŽćė ž§Ď, projectionžóź ŪēīŽčĻŽźėŽäĒ ŪĒĹžÖÄÍįížĚĄ ÍįÄž†łžôÄ LiDAR coloržóź ž†Āžö©žčúŪā§ŽäĒŽćį žčúÍįĄžĚī ŽßéžĚī ŽďúŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪĖąŽč§.

Ouster OS1 64žĪĄŽĄź Íłįž§Ä point žąė: 65536 Ouster OS2 128žĪĄŽĄź Íłįž§Ä point žąė: 262144

žĚľŽč® žöįŽ¶¨ÍįÄ ÍłįŽ≥łž†ĀžúľŽ°ú ŽįįžöįŽäĒ Í≤ÉÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī LiDARžĚė Extrinsic parameterŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēú transformation matrixžôÄ CamaeražĚė projection matrixŽ•ľ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī ž†ēžĚėŪēėŽ©ī:

LiDAR Extrinsic parameter: \(R_{LiDAR}, t_{LiDAR}\)

LiDAR Transformation matrix: \(T_{LiDAR} = \left[ R\; \vert \; t; \left[ 0, 0, 0, 1 \right] \right]\)

Camera Extrinsic parameter: \(R_{cam}, t_{cam}\)

Camera Projection matrix: \(P = C \left [ R' \; \vert \; -R't \right]\)

žúĄžôÄ ÍįôžĚī ŽźėÍ≥†, LiDAR point cloudŽ•ľ \(\mathbf{X}_{LiDAR}\)Ž°ú ŪĎúŪėĄŪēėÍ≤Ć ŽźėŽ©ī:

LiDAR point cloud : \(\mathbf{X}_{LiDAR} = \left[ \mathbf{x}_0, \mathbf{x}_1, \dots , \mathbf{x}_n \right]\)

LiDAR point cloud in global reference frame: \(\mathbf{X}h_{Global} = T_{LiDAR}P_{LiDAR}\)

žó¨ÍłįžĄú \(\mathbf{X}h\)ŽäĒ homogeneous coordinatežĚłŽćį, žč§ž†úŽ°ú 4Ž≤ąžßł rowŽßĆ žóÜžē†Ž©ī ŽźúŽč§.

žĖīž®ĆŽď†, žĻīŽ©ĒŽĚľžóź projectionŽźú LiDAR point cloudŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžĚī ŽźúŽč§.

Projected Lidar point cloud : \(\mathbf{X}h_{cam} = P\mathbf{X}h_{Global}\)

žĚīÍĪī Žč§žčú ŪíÄžĖīžďįŽ©ī

Projected Lidar point cloud:

\[\mathbf{X}h_{cam} = C \left[ R' \; \vert \; -R't \right] T_{LiDAR}P_{LiDAR}\]

ŽßĆžēĹ LiDAR point cloudŽ•ľ Ž®ľž†Ä global reference frameŽ°ú ŽįĒÍŅĒž£ľÍ≥† projection matrixŽ•ľ Žč§žčú Í≥ĪŪēīž§ÄŽč§Ž©ī žóįžāįžĚī 2Žįį žĚīžÉĀžúľŽ°ú ŽďúŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąŽč§.

Í∑łŽěėžĄú žĚľŽč® Projection matrixžôÄ lidaržĚė transformation matrixŽ•ľ Ž®ľž†Ä Í≥ĪŪēīž£ľÍ≥† pointcloudžóź ž†Āžö©ŪēėŽ©ī ŽćĒ Ūö®žú®ž†ĀžĚł projectionžĚī Žź† Í≤ÉžĚīŽč§.

ŪÖĆžä§ŪäłŽäĒ EigenžĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪĖąŽč§.

Transformation matrix: Eigen::Matrix4f

Lidar Point Cloud: Eigen::Matrix4Xf

OS2 128chžĚė point cloud transformation žčúÍįĄ: 0.0647862s

OS1 64chžĚė point cloud transformation žčúÍįĄ : 0.0309353s

OS2 128chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ : 0.502041s

OS1 64chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ: 0.253995s

Ž¨īŽ†§ 9~10ŽįįÍįÄŽüČ žčúÍįĄžĚī ŽõīÍ≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąžóąŽč§! žó¨ÍłįžĄú ŽÜÄŽĚľžöīÍĪī point transformation -> projection = point projectionžĚī žēĄŽčąŽĚľ Í∑łŽÉ• projectionžóźŽßĆ žčúÍįĄžĚī žĚīŽ†áÍ≤Ć Žõī Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąŽč§.

Projection MatrixžóźŽäĒ 3 by 4žĚė Eigen::MatrixXfŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėžėÄŽäĒŽćį‚Ä¶. žĖīŽĖ°ŪēėžßÄ „Öú Eigen::Matrix4fŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēīŽ≥ľÍĻĆ ŪēúŽč§.

Projection MatrixŽ•ľ 4 by 4žĚė Eigen::Matrix4fŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēīžĄú projection Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ Íłįž°ī \(\left[u; v; w\right]\)žóźžĄú \(\left[u; v; w; 1\right]\)Ž°ú žďłŽćįžóÜžßÄŽßĆ ŽßąžßÄŽßČžóź 1žĚĄ ŽĄ£Í≤Ć ŽźėžóąŽč§.

Í∑łŽü¨ŽčąÍĻĆ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôžēėŽč§.

OS2 128chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ : 0.0243272s

OS1 64chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ: 0.0122136s

žÜĒÍĻĆ žĚīŪēīžēąŽź® Í∑ľŽćį žĚīžĘÖžĚė matrix typežóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄú Í≥ĄžāįžčúÍįĄžĚī Ūôēžč§Ūěą žį®žĚīÍįÄ ŽāėŽäĒ Í≤É ÍįôŽč§.

žąėž†ē -> žßÄÍłą Ž≥īŽčąÍĻĆ debug Ž™®ŽďúŽ°ú ŽźėžĖīžěąžóąŽč§ „Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö†„Ö† RelWithDebInfo Ž™®ŽďúŽ°ú Ž≥ÄÍ≤ĹŪēīžĄú ŽŹĆŽ¶¨Ž©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

OS2 128chžĚė point cloud transformation žčúÍįĄ: 0.0647862s(debug), 0.00182863(RelWithDebInfo)

OS1 64chžĚė point cloud transformation žčúÍįĄ : 0.0309353s(debug), 0.00104007s(RelWithDebInfo)

OS2 128chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ : 0.502041s (debug), 0.000720223s (RelWithDebInfo)

OS1 64chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ: 0.253995s (debug), 0.000356825s (RelWithDebInfo)

Point Projectionžóź Eigen::Matrix4fŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©ī

OS2 128chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ : 0.0243272s (debug), 0.000662277s (RelWithDebInfo)

OS1 64chžĚė point projection žčúÍįĄ: 0.0122136s (debug), 0.000243122s (RelWithDebInfo)

Ūôēžč§Ūěą debugŽ™®ŽďúžóźžĄ† žĚīžĘÖ matrixžóź ŽĆÄŪēī žčúÍįĄžĚī ŽćĒ ÍĪłŽ¶¨ŽāėŽ≥īŽč§. žó¨Ūäľ RelWithDebInfožóźžĄúŽäĒ ŪĀį žį®žĚīÍįÄ žóÜžúľŽāė, žĚīžĘÖžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ žčúÍįĄžĚī ŽćĒ ÍĪłŽ¶¨ŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄúŽŹĄ žč†ÍłįŪēúÍĪī, transformationžĚīŽěĎ projectionžĚīŽěĎ ÍĪįžĚė žčúÍįĄžĚī ŽĻĄžä∑Ūē† Í≤É ÍįôžĚÄŽćį žį®žĚīÍįÄ 3~5Žįį ž†ēŽŹĄ žį®žĚīÍįÄ ŽāúŽč§‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶. Ž™®Ž•īÍ≤ĄŽč§ žĚīž††

žó¨Ūäľ žēĄž£ľ žěĎžĚÄ žčúÍįĄžĚīŽĚľŽŹĄ (ms) žēĄÍĻĆžöī Ž≤ē, transformation ŪõĄ projection žčúŪā§Ž©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§:

OS1 64ch Total time: 0.00169765s

Projection matrixžôÄ transformation matrixŽ•ľ Ž®ľž†Ä Í≥ĪŪēú Ží§ projection žčúŪā§Ž©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§:

OS2 128ch Total time: 0.000769061s OS1 64ch Total time: 0.000388105s

ÍĪįžĚė Ž¨īžä® 3Žįį~5Žįįž†ēŽŹĄ ŽćĒ ŽĻ®ŽĚľžßĄŽč§.

žó¨Ūäľ Í≤įŽ°†:

point cloudžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄú ŽĎźŽ≤ą Í≥ĪŪēėÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź žčúÍįĄžĚī žė§Žěė ÍĪłŽ¶¨ŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚł ž§Ą žēĆžēėŽćė Ž¨łž†úÍįÄ compile Ž™®Žďúžóź žĚėŪēú Í≤ÉžĚīžóąŽč§ŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ÍĻ®Žč¨žĚĆ

Eigen::MatrixXfŽāė Eigen::Matrix3Xf Ž•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ÉŽ≥īŽč§ ŪĀ¨ÍłįÍįÄ ž†ēŪēīžßĄ Eigen::Matrix4fŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚī ŽćĒ ŽĻ†Ž¶Ą

entry.title: ikd-Tree (2021 arxiv)
entry.content:
ikd-Tre: An Inceremtnal K-D Tree for Robotic Applications

ž†ÄžěźŽäĒ ŪôćžĹ©ŽĆÄžĚė MaRS Lab žóįÍĶ¨žßĄŽď§žĚīŽč§. Fast-LIO, Fast-LIO2Ž•ľ Ž≥īŽ©į žēĆÍ≤Ć ŽźúÍĪīŽćį ikd-tree ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú ž†úžěĎŽźėžóąŽč§Í≥† ŪēīžĄú žĚľŽč® žēĆžēĄŽ≥īÍ≥†žěź ŽÖľŽ¨łžĚĄ žĚĹÍ≤Ć ŽźėžóąŽč§.

Abstract

Dynamic space partitionžĚĄ žúĄŪēú ikd-treeŽ•ľ ž†úžēąŪēúŽč§. ikd-Tree ŽäĒ incrementalŪēėÍ≤Ć k-d treeŽ•ľ žÉąŽ°úžöī ž†źŽď§ŽßĆ ÍįÄžßÄÍ≥† update Ūē®žúľŽ°úžĄú Íłįž°ī static k-d treeŽ≥īŽč§ Ūõ®žĒ¨ ž†ĀžĚÄŽüČžĚė žóįžāįžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźúŽč§. point-wise operation žôłžóźŽŹĄ robotic applicationžóź žěźž£ľ žā¨žö©ŽźėŽäĒ box-wise operationžĚīŽāė down-samplingŽŹĄ ž†úÍ≥ĶŪēúŽč§. SLAM Í≥ĶŽ∂ÄŽ•ľ ŪēėŽ©į žßĀž†Ď ÍĶ¨ŪėĄžĚĄ ŪēėŽ©īžĄú threadingžĚĄ žěė Ž™®Ž•īŽčą žó¨Žü¨ žĖīŽ†§žõÄžĚī žěąžĖī Žāīžö©žĚĄ ž†ēŽ¶¨Ūē† Í≤ł žč§žäĶžĚĄ žßĄŪĖČŪēīŽī§Žč§.

žĚľŽč® ŪÖĆžä§ŪäłŽ•ľ žúĄŪēī ŪėĄžě¨ ÍĶ¨ŪėĄŪēėÍ≥†žěź ŪēėŽäĒ ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ ŽĆÄžÉĀžúľŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŪēīŽī§Žč§.

ÍłįŽ≥łž†ĀžúľŽ°ú sensor sequencežóź ŽĆÄŪēī žě¨žÉĚŪēėŽäĒ ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ ŽßĆŽď§žĖīžēľ ŽźėŽäĒŽćį, žó¨ÍłįžĄúŽäĒ žĚľŽč® žėĀžÉĀžóź ŽĆÄŪēīžĄúŽßĆ žßĄŪĖČŪēėÍ≥†žěź ŪēúŽč§. žčúŽāėŽ¶¨žė§ŽäĒ Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§. žėĀžÉĀžĚĄ Ž∂ąŽü¨žė§Í≥† ž≤ėŽ¶¨ŪēėŽäĒ Í≥ľž†ēžóźžĄú Ž∂ąŽü¨žė§ŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄÍ≥ľ ž≤ėŽ¶¨ŪēėŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚĄ Žč§Ž•ł threadŽ°ú ŽßĆŽďúŽäĒ Í≥ľž†ēžĚīŽč§. žĚīŽ∂ÄŽ∂ĄžĚĄ ŪēúÍįúžĚė threadŽßĆ žā¨žö©Ūēėžó¨ ž≤ėŽ¶¨ŪēėŽ©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú image loadingžóź \(t_1\)žĚė žčúÍįĄžĚĄ, image processingžóź \(t_2\)žĚė žčúÍįĄžĚī žöĒÍĶ¨ŽźúŽč§Ž©ī, ž†Ąž≤ī processžóź \(t_1 + t_2\)žĚė žčúÍįĄžĚī žÜĆžöĒŽźúŽč§.

ÍįĀÍįĀžĚĄ threadŽ°ú ž≤ėŽ¶¨ŪēėŽ©ī Žč§žĚĆÍ≥ľ ÍįôŽč§.

žĚīŽüį ÍĶ¨ž°įŽ°ú žßĄŪĖČŪēúŽč§Ž©ī image processing ŪēėŽäĒ žčúÍįĄžóź image loadingžĚī žßĄŪĖČžĚī ŽźėžĖī žčúÍįĄžĚÄ \(t_1 + t_2\)žóźžĄú \(t_2\)Ž°ú žßßžēĄžßĄŽč§.

žó¨ÍłįžĄú KeywordŽäĒ ÍįĀÍįĀ threadÍįÄ inputžĚī žóÜžĚĄ ŽēĆ žďłŽćį žóÜžĚī ŽŹĆžēĄÍįÄŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ Žį©žßÄŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēú condition_variableÍ≥ľ Í≥ĶŪÜĶžúľŽ°ú žā¨žö©ŽźėŽäĒ variabležóź ŽĆÄŪēī threadÍįÄ ŽŹôžčúžóź ž†ĎÍ∑ľŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŽßČŽäĒ mutexžĚīŽč§.

MutexŽěÄ mutual exclusivežĚė ž§ÄŽßźŽ°ú ÍįĀÍłį Žč§Ž•ł threadžóźžĄú ŽŹôžčúžóź ÍįôžĚÄ variabležóź ŽĆÄŪēú accessŽ•ľ Žį©žßÄŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēī žā¨žö©ŽźúŽč§.

c++ unixžóźžĄú ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽěėŽįć Ūē†ŽēĆŽäĒ
